entries.title: Realistic Long-Haired Cat Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly realistic studio portrait of a long-haired domestic cat facing forward in a tight head-and-chest crop, centered in the frame and looking directly at the viewer with a calm, slightly serious expression. The cat has dark charcoal gray and white bicolor fur, with a white muzzle, white blaze running up the center of the forehead, fluffy white chest, darker gray cheeks and crown, and long layered fur with visible individual strands. Emphasize large upright triangular ears with pink inner ears and fine ear tufts, bright golden amber eyes with sharp vertical pupils, a small soft pink nose, and long white whiskers extending outward on both sides. Use photorealistic animal photography style, extremely detailed fur texture, natural soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the face and eyes, subtle catchlights, and a smooth dark deep green backdrop with gentle vignette. Vertical portrait composition, square-to-near-portrait crop, no accessories, no text, no watermark, no human elements.
entries.description: A photorealistic close-up studio portrait of a fluffy bicolor cat with amber eyes, ideal for pet photography or animal character reference.
entries.displayTitleZh: Realistic Long-Haired Cat 人像

entries.title: Chibi Cat-Girl Close-Up
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a close-up square anime illustration of a chibi cat-girl character named a mischievous wolf-cat girl, centered from the chest up against a plain muted dark teal-green background. She has a large rounded chibi head, white feline face and paws, long messy layered charcoal gray hair with bold white front streaks, and two oversized upright cat ears with dark gray outer fur, pink inner ears, and fluffy white tufts. Her eyes are large golden amber cat eyes with vertical slit pupils, glossy highlights, heavy black upper lashes, and a sly half-lidded expression; add a tiny pink triangular nose, small cat mouth with two tiny fangs, faint blush under the eyes, gray muzzle markings, and long thin white whiskers extending from both cheeks. Pose her with one white paw curled near her chin as if smugly thinking during a break. Dress her in a primitive tribal fantasy outfit consisting of exactly 5 visible outfit/accessory elements: a black fluffy fur collar, a brown leather one-shoulder chest wrap, a row of small ivory fang ornaments at the neckline, brown leather wrist wraps on the raised arm, and a brown armband with white diamond patterns on the opposite upper arm. Use crisp digital anime line art, soft cel shading, glossy hair highlights, high contrast black outlines, detailed fur texture around ears and collar, cute but slightly feral expression, no text, no watermark, no extra characters, and keep the composition tightly cropped with the ears nearly touching the top edge.
entries.description: Generates a cute mischievous chibi cat-girl portrait with tribal fantasy clothing for anime character art.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的人像条目《Chibi Cat-Girl Close-Up》。 关键词：portrait。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Overhead Café Pose Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the base, regenerate the same subject in the same outfit and outdoor café terrace setting, but change the composition to a close, high-angle overhead shot looking down from above. Repose her seated on the wicker café chair, leaning slightly forward and holding a white coffee cup filled with black coffee with both hands near her chest. Keep the lavender sheer blouse, lace camisole detail, gray skirt, jewelry, hair, wicker chair, round stone café table, vase of small white flowers, balcony greenery, and sunny dappled shadows consistent with the reference. Crop tighter around the upper body and table edge, with exactly 1 cup in her hands, 1 empty white saucer on the table, and 1 small glass vase of white flowers visible. Preserve the anonymized face treatment as a solid rectangular blur block over the face. Use realistic natural daylight photography, shallow depth of field, soft highlights, and no added text or watermark.
entries.description: Transforms a reference café portrait into a close overhead shot of the same subject holding coffee while preserving the outfit and setting.

entries.title: Magic Academy Graduation Portrait System
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate **9 different individually refined graduation portrait photos** based on the 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, all in **3:4 vertical composition**. 
The theme is:

**"British Magic Academy Graduation Portrait"**

---

## I. Character Consistency

Please strictly preserve the user's true identity features, including but not limited to:

- Face shape
- Facial feature proportions
- Eye shape
- Nose shape
- Lip shape
- Skin tone
- Age feeling
- Hairstyle basis
- Body type
- Overall temperament

In all 9 images, it must clearly look like the **same real girl**. 
Do not turn into a stranger, do not westernize, do not use internet celebrity aesthetics, do not over-smooth skin, and do not use AI fake faces.

Please only use the uploaded photos as **identity references**, do not keep the realistic background, daily clothing, or original composition from the source photos. 
Please regenerate a completely new set of **British Magic Academy Graduation Portraits**.

---

## II. Overall Positioning

The focus of this set is not a realistic portrait, but rather:

**"British Magic Academy Graduation Theme + Surreal AI Magic Scenes + Movie Poster Visual Impact."**

The entire set should resemble:

- A set of high-concept magic academy movie promotional posters
- Clearly filled with AI spectacle visuals
- Featuring exaggerated space, grand narratives, and a strong magical atmosphere
- Preserving both the graduation identity and a refined portrait feel

Overall Keywords:

- British
- Academy
- Graduation
- Magic
- Movie poster feel
- Floating pages
- Flying books
- Giant owl
- Starry dome
- Magic light trails
- Gothic library
- Mysterious candlelight
- Surreal space
- High-end feel
- Strong narrative feel

---

## III. Clothing Requirements

Clothing should follow the logic of **"Academy Graduation Robe + Magic Elements."**

Requirements:

- Preserve graduation robe / academic gown silhouette
- Preserve academic cap / mortarboard system
- Add academy scarves, badges, crests, trimmings, ties, and embroidery details
- Inner wear can include white shirts, ties, knit vests, pleated skirts, or academy long skirts
- Overall looks like a commemorative portrait style for an "outstanding magic academy graduate"
- Clothing is unified, complete, and has a cinematic quality
- Do not make it look like a stage costume
- Avoid cheap cosplay feel

---

## IV. Scenes and Surreal Spectacle Requirements

The 9 images should revolve around the magic academy world-building and be significantly more exaggerated, dreamlike, and cinematic than ordinary portraits.

High Priority Visual Elements:

- Towering bookshelves
- Gothic library
- Magical book mountain
- Floating pages
- Flying books
- Giant owl
- Candlelit hall
- Glowing scrolls
- Starry dome
- Deep blue cosmic sky
- Glowing magic lines
- Spell light trails surrounding the character
- Blue-white magic particles
- Backlit smoke
- Giant ancient book covers
- Ritualistic academy certificates
- Light beams through arched windows
- Large magical creature guardian composition

Overall should feel like:
**Magical academy movie poster spectacle scenes that only AI can create.**

---

## V. Lighting and Image Quality Requirements

Lighting Requirements:

- Cool blue moonlight / starlight
- Warm golden candlelight
- Partial backlighting
- Magic glowing particles
- Atmospheric smoke
- Rich layers of light and dark
- Clear character face
- Clear facial and hand details
- Cinematic lighting

Quality Requirements:

- Realistic photography texture
- High precision
- High-end feel
- Cinematic feel
- No ordinary photo studio feel
- No dull backgrounds
- No plastic skin
- No messy or cheap CG feel

---

## VI. Fixed Allocation of 9 Individual Photos

Please output the following **9 different individually refined photos** at once:

### 1st | Main Visual Poster
- Full body or 3/4 body
- Character standing in the center of a towering magic library
- Surrounded by a large number of floating pages
- Holding a wand or graduation scroll
- Very strong main movie poster visual feel

### 2nd | Spell-casting Close-up
- Half-body close-up
- Character holding a wand
- Pages flying in front and behind the camera
- Background has a glowing starry dome or magic canopy
- Emphasize face, hands, and spell-casting feel

### 3rd | Giant Owl Guardian
- Medium shot or full body
- A giant owl appears behind or to the side
- Character holding a book, scroll, or lightly raising a hand for a spell
- Clear narrative sense of guardianship and companionship

### 4th | Surrounding Light Trail Spell-casting
- Full body
- Character standing and casting a spell
- Glowing magical rings circling around
- Books pages floating in the air
- Stronger atmosphere, more dramatic

### 5th | Starry Library Contemplation
- Half-body or medium close-up
- Character set in a Gothic library
- Background is a deep blue starry sky, candlelight, glowing pages
- Holding an ancient book or magic scroll
- Expression is quiet, smart, and mysterious

### 6th | Book Mountain and Flying Books
- Medium shot
- Character standing among stacked mountains of books
- Flying books circling overhead and around
- Exaggerated composition, large spatial scale
- Clear surreal spectacle effect

### 7th | Graduation Identity Reinforcement
- 3/4 body
- Character clearly displaying the graduation robe, academy scarf, badges, and cap system
- Holding a graduation certificate or academy scroll
- Background is academy hall / candlelit auditorium / bookshelves

### 8th | Low-angle Heroic Poster
- Full body or medium shot
- Low-angle shot
- Character posture has more presence
- Pages, light effects, and particles extending upwards from around the character
- Like a final protagonist poster after graduation

### 9th | Emotional Conclusion
- Half-body close-up
- Character in a quiet mysterious library corner or in front of an arched window
- Can include candlelight, feathers, glowing dust, slightly floating pages
- One hand lightly touching an ancient book or scarf
- Serving as the most emotional and story-driven image in the set

---

## VII. Unified Requirements

The 9 images must be unified in:

- The same real face
- The same British magic academy graduation styling system
- The same academy color scheme
- The same world-building system
- The same movie poster atmosphere
- The same surreal magic spectacle style

The 9 images must have clear variations in:

- Camera distance
- Perspective height
- Actions
- Expressions
- Prop interaction
- Focus of magic spectacle
- Composition methods

---

## VIII. Explicit Avoidance

- No dull portraits
- No cheap cosplay feel
- No modern campus daily style
- No cheap studio magic style
- No messy background stacking without a focus
- No character face changes
- No westernization
- No internet celebrity faces
- No over-smoothing of skin
- No AI fake faces
- No incorrect fingers
- No incorrect body structures

entries.title: Luxury Ballet Couture Portrait Series
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate **9 different individually refined portrait photos** based on the 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, all in **3:4 vertical composition**.

The theme is:

**"Luxury Light and Shadow Ballet Style Portrait"**

Atmosphere reference: High-budget sample photos, European dreamlike, swan princess, stage backlighting, crystal chandeliers, vintage gold mirrors, floating snowflakes and feathers, white gold haute couture ballet dress, ethereal yet noble, resembling expensive photo studio sample shots.

---

## I. Character Consistency

Please strictly preserve the user's true identity features, including but not limited to:

- Face shape
- facial proportions
- Eye shape
- Nose shape
- Lip shape
- Skin tone
- Age feeling
- Hairline
- Hairstyle basis
- Body type
- Overall temperament

The same real girl must appear in all 9 photos. Do not turn her into a stranger, do not westernize, do not use internet celebrity styles, do not over-smooth the skin, and do not use AI fake faces.

---

## II. Overall Style Positioning

This is not an ordinary fairy portrait or a standard wedding studio shoot. It is:

**High-cost Studio Ballet Samples + European Mirror Hall Dream + Magnificent Light and Shadow Epic**

The overall feel must satisfy:
- Looks like the hair and makeup were expensive
- Looks like the lighting was expensive
- Looks like the clothing was expensive
- Looks like the post-processing was expensive
- Every image can serve as a commercial cover

Keywords: Light and shadow ballet, White swan / Snow feather princess, European vintage, Mirror hall, Crystal chandeliers, Classic carved mirror, Snow effect, Haute couture feather ballet dress, Fragile elegance, Noble, Ethereal, Stage presence, Cinematic poster feel.

---

## III. Scene Setting

The scene is a **high-end European studio in a dark setting**.
Spatial elements can be combined flexibly:
- Vintage gold floor mirror / European carved mirror
- Black or dark background space
- Crystal chandeliers
- Sequins, glitter, icy reflections on the floor
- Floating snowflakes / feathers / fine glitter fragments in the air
- Minimal European decoration
- Moderate mirror reflections
- Local strong light beams / light spots / lens flare

The space must look like a high-end sample studio, not a home setting.

---

## IV. Clothing and Styling

Clothing is **Haute Couture Ballet Style**.
Structure suggestions:
- White / Cream white / Pearl white / Champagne white
- Feathers, tulle, sequins, silver threads, diamond details
- Corset-style top
- Voluminous tutu or short ballet skirt hem
- Lightweight feather shoulder decorations
- Ballet shoes / ribbon-tied dance shoes / pointe-style footwear
- Small touches of pearls, chains, or diamond embellishments

It must be: Magnificent, dreamlike, expensive, detailed, and looking like custom-made sample clothing.

---

## V. Hairstyle Requirements (Must follow user's original hairstyle)

Hairstyles must be an advanced ballet-style extension of the user's actual hair, strictly adhering to:
- Original hair color
- Original hairline
- Original bang type
- Original length and overall volume trend
- No forced blonde hair or specific bun templates

Upgrades can include: Elegant buns, French half-updos, Princess updos, or soft semi-tied styles decorated with crystal crowns, light tiaras, feather hairpieces, or pearl accessories.

---

## VI. Makeup Requirements

Studio-level refined makeup: Flawless cream skin, sophisticated highlighting and contouring, delicate lashes, under-eye glitter, peach/rose/champagne eye tones, cool or neutral highlights, slightly flushed cheeks, and polished lips. Must be dreamlike and expensive but not a fake face.

---

## VII. Camera Design for 9 Individual Photos

1. **Mirror Reflection Close-up**: Half-body near the mirror, looking back at the camera. Focus on shoulder line, crown, and eyes with floating snowflakes.
2. **Backlit Semi-profile**: 3/4 body shot with strong backlighting on the bun and dress edges like a stage light.
3. **Grand Scene Sitting**: Sitting on the floor near the mirror, skirt spread out, looking up at the chandelier. Full-body shot.
4. **Full Body Ballet Pose**: Elegant ballet arm movements, long leg lines, voluminous skirt. Main visual poster style.
5. **Cover Style Sitting**: Sitting on the floor/platform, hand on chest/collarbone, mid-close-up shot.
6. **Looking Up at Light**: Standing or sitting, looking up at the light source with a quiet, dreamlike expression. High detail on crown and feathers.
7. **Quiet Curled Pose**: Sitting on the floor holding knees, soft and relaxed, like a backstage candid shot. Atmospheric and fragile.
8. **Dreamy Portrait with Hand on Face**: Sitting by the mirror, leaning face on one hand, soft expression. Commercial cover style.
9. **Looking Down at Skirt**: Gentle and introspective shot looking at dress details or feathers, a quiet concluding image.

---

## VIII. Expressions and Emotions

Distribute different emotions: Quiet gaze, gentle look back, ethereal looking up, noble distance, soft dreaminess, thoughtful, fragile, slight melancholy, and relaxed stillness.

---

## IX. Photography and Quality

Must have high-cost texture: Realistic photography, rim lighting, atmospheric lighting, crystal reflections, soft skin, high-contrast dark gold background, dynamic floating elements, and lens flare. Cinematic lighting quality.

---

## X. Negative Requirements

Do not change identity. No cheap princess dresses. No standard wedding styles. No internet celebrity filters. No plastic skin. No fake faces. No extra/deformed fingers or body structures. No repetitive poses or expressions.

entries.title: Sunlit Butterfly Mirror Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Use the uploaded portrait only as the identity and hairstyle reference. Preserve the subject's facial identity, face shape, hairstyle, skin tone, natural body proportions, and realistic personal features. Do not copy the uploaded portrait's background, outfit, lighting, or pose. Create a vertical hyper-realistic lifestyle portrait in a cozy indoor bedroom or dressing room, shot like a real casual smartphone photo with a dreamy warm sunlight atmosphere. The subject is sitting slightly forward, facing the camera with a soft natural expression, relaxed shoulders, and gentle eye contact. The composition should feel intimate, youthful, bright, and slightly nostalgic. The scene is lit by strong golden sunlight coming from the side and behind the subject, creating glowing rim light around the hair, bright sun flares, soft overexposed highlights, and natural shadow contrast. The hair should catch the sunlight with visible fine hair strands and realistic texture. The background includes a casual mirror, bookshelves, posters, soft room clutter, and a warm lived-in interior. In the mirror, show a partial rear reflection of the subject, naturally matching the main subject's hairstyle and outfit from behind. Keep the reflection physically realistic and not distorted. The subject wears a casual light cream or pastel graphic T-shirt with tasteful English text on it, such as "SUNLIT BUTTERFLY DIARY" or "SOFT SUMMER MEMORY", paired with a relaxed plaid shirt or light jacket slipping off the shoulders. The outfit should look natural, casual, cute, and realistic, not cosplay and not overly styled. Add many colorful realistic butterflies flying around the subject and filling the frame, with different sizes, colors, and depths. Some butterflies are close to the camera, some are mid-air, and some are farther in the background. The butterflies should look like realistic photo elements, softly integrated with the lighting, perspective, and depth of field. Use orange, blue, yellow, white, purple, and green butterflies. The lower foreground can have denser butterflies, while the upper area has scattered flying butterflies. Style: real-life photography, photorealistic, natural skin texture, realistic facial details, soft warm sunlight, dreamy indoor portrait, casual youthful mood, smartphone snapshot realism, high detail, realistic mirror reflection, cinematic golden-hour backlight, no anime style, no cartoon style, no illustration. entries.title: Pastel Zodiac Avatar Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cute 12-character Chinese zodiac avatar collection in one image, designed as a social media profile icon style expansion set.

Canvas: A square 4:5-ish poster-like canvas divided into a clean 3-column by 4-row grid, with 12 equal rectangular portrait panels and thin light borders between panels. Each panel is a close-up bust portrait of one anthropomorphic zodiac animal in a dreamy outdoor flower meadow.

Visual style: Soft hand-painted pastel gouache and oil-pastel texture, visible crayon-like strokes, whimsical children's book illustration, bright spring colors, cozy internet-avatar aesthetic, fluffy textures, rounded faces, expressive eyes, playful accessories, warm sunlight, abundant wildflowers, painterly backgrounds, no photorealism.

Subject details: Include exactly 12 zodiac avatar panels, in this order from left to right, top to bottom: 1) Rat: gray mouse wearing yellow sunglasses, holding a wedge of cheese, surrounded by flowers. 2) Ox: shaggy brown ox with horns, wearing a green hoodie and large black headphones, calm expression under a sunny sky. 3) Tiger: orange tiger in a pale hoodie, holding or leaning beside a green skateboard, sleepy cool expression. 4) Rabbit: fluffy white rabbit wearing pink heart-shaped sunglasses and a pink outfit, holding a carrot. 5) Dragon: pastel green dragon with small golden horns and flowing mane, blowing a translucent bubble, magical pink-green background. 6) Snake: cute green snake or turtle-like snake character wearing a pink floral bandana and pink headphones, sipping a drink with a straw among flowers. 7) Horse: gray horse with brown mane, wearing pink headphones around the neck, blowing bubblegum. 8) Goat: fluffy white sheep/goat wearing round yellow glasses and a yellow beret, holding a small vintage camera. 9) Monkey: brown monkey in a purple hoodie with pink sunglasses resting on its head, eating a banana. 10) Rooster: colorful rooster with red comb and green sunglasses, wearing a pearl necklace and sipping a drink. 11) Dog: cheerful tan-and-white dog wearing a backwards green cap and green bandana, raising one paw with visible paw pads and tongue out. 12) Pig: pink pig wearing pink heart-shaped sunglasses and pink overalls, holding a sprinkled donut.

Text content: No words, no labels, no logos, no watermark.

Customization: The overall theme is Chinese zodiac social media avatars; the art style is soft pastel gouache and oil-pastel illustration; the season and setting are sunny spring wildflower meadow; the color palette is bright pastel pink, mint green, sky blue, yellow, and warm cream; the accessory mood is trendy cute internet fashion with sunglasses, headphones, hoodies, drinks, and snacks.

Constraints: Keep exactly 12 panels and exactly one main animal per panel. Maintain consistent portrait scale, soft square-avatar composition, playful youthful expressions, and dense floral painterly backgrounds across all panels.

entries.title: Realistic Pet and Owner Wide-Angle Selfie
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate a photo of a person and a pet with a realistic mobile phone selfie feel based on the uploaded photos.

Only use the uploaded person photo for identity reference and the uploaded pet photo for pet identity reference. Strictly preserve the real identifying features of both, including face shape, facial proportions, skin tone, hairstyle, and temperament for the person, and species, breed, fur color, patterns, and expression for the pet. Do not beautify, change faces, or turn the person into an AI model. The pet must be the specific one from the photo.

Set the scene to look as if the pet is holding the phone for a casual selfie. Use a close-up wide-angle mobile phone selfie perspective with the pet in the extreme foreground. The person should be behind or to the side of the pet, crouching or leaning into the frame. The person is wearing light-colored, simple, daily clothes. 

The background is set in a typical Chinese residential area or daily community environment, featuring realistic elements like railings, windows, and common community corners. 

The overall style must be high-realism photography with a handheld feel, including slight motion blur or noise to look like a raw mobile photo rather than a professional shoot. Avoid AI-looking faces, excessive skin smoothing, or studio-style lighting.

entries.title: Four-Panel Train Station Pose Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic 3:4 vertical photo-collage divided into exactly 4 equal panels in a 2×2 grid, separated by thick white borders, showing the same Japanese adult woman with shoulder-length straight black hair in different poses at an outdoor train station platform.

Canvas and layout: Portrait 3:4 aspect ratio. Four evenly sized rectangular photos arranged in a square grid: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right. Use candid smartphone-photo realism with natural daylight, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, overcast sky, railway tracks, overhead electric wires, fences, platform markings, station signs, and a train visible in one panel. Add large red text with a white outline reading GPT 2 in the upper-left corner of the overall collage. Add a faint semi-transparent watermark across the center reading ©CottonAIImageLABO.

Subject details: The woman wears a navy polo shirt, blue plaid pleated skirt, dark knee socks, carries a large navy shoulder bag with a light gray strap and a pink heart-shaped charm, and has her face obscured by a soft rectangular blur in every panel for anonymity. Keep the same outfit and bag consistent across all 4 panels.

Four panels, exactly counted:
1. Top-left: full-body selfie-like shot on the train platform, the woman reaches one hand toward the camera with an open palm, bag on shoulder, tracks and platform stretching behind her.
2. Top-right: medium shot, she raises one hand to her forehead in a salute or shading gesture, bag on shoulder, tracks and platform behind her.
3. Bottom-left: closer portrait beside a stopped train with an orange stripe, she makes a peace sign near her face, bag strap visible.
4. Bottom-right: full-body angled shot near a transfer sign, she points one arm upward with index finger extended, holding the shoulder bag with the other hand.

Visual style: Highly realistic Japanese smartphone photography, casual travel snapshot, natural muted colors, overcast lighting, slight background blur, authentic train-platform perspective, no glamor lighting, no illustration or anime style.

Constraints: Use exactly 4 panels and exactly the 4 poses listed. Keep the same person, clothing, bag, and station setting in all panels. Preserve the 2×2 collage structure and white dividing lines. Do not add extra people or extra text beyond the top label and faint watermark.

entries.title: IP Character Avatar Poster Designer
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
You are an "IP Avatar Poster Designer." Please generate a "Real Subject + Q-version Avatars + Daily Avatar Journal Poster" based on the subject image uploaded by the user.

Core Rules:
First, observe the uploaded subject image and extract the core identification features: gender temperament, hairstyle, hair color, face shape, facial features, clothing, accessories, posture, color, and overall atmosphere.
Keep the real image or highly similar real photographic visual of the subject in the center of the poster; do not change the face, hairstyle, clothing, or temperament.
Generate 6-9 Q-version avatars around the subject. Each avatar must originate from the same subject image, maintaining consistency in hairstyle, clothing, color, and facial temperament.
Avatar actions should be automatically selected based on the subject's temperament; do not use templates exclusively.
Behavior Pool:
Gentle & Healing: Sunbathing, drinking coffee, listening to music, dazing with a pillow, writing a diary, taking a walk.
Learning & Growth: Reading, taking notes, computer work, thinking, photo recording, organizing plans.
Energetic & Cute: Jumping happily, eating dessert, making a heart gesture, taking a selfie, stretching, lying flat.
Working Daily: Meeting, overtime, slacking off, received, rushing a draft, off work.
Relaxed Life: Looking at scenery, nesting on the sofa, drying quilts, watering flowers, petting pets, cooking.
Cool & Independent: Wearing headphones, walking with wind, thinking with head down, holding a camera, urban night walking.
Automatic Selection Rules:
If the subject is gentle and fresh, prioritize healing, life, and recording actions.
If the subject has a strong professional feel, prioritize work, study, and efficiency actions.
If the subject is cute and lively, prioritize energetic and expression-rich actions.
If the subject is cold and cool, prioritize independent, urban, and low-saturation actions.
If the subject is a pet or animal, change to pet daily avatars: eating, sleeping, acting cute, dazing, playing, asking for hugs, patrolling, hide and seek.
Poster Structure:
Vertical 4:5 or 3:4 journal poster.
The central area is the real visual of the subject.
6-9 Q-version avatars are arranged around it.
Add white hand-drawn graffiti, arrows, hearts, stars, cloud bubbles, sticky notes, today's checklist, mood records, and dashed borders.
Overall, it looks like a life journal, a character's small diary, or an IP avatar display page.
Title Generation:
Automatically generate a cute title based on the subject's temperament, for example:
"My Daily Avatars"
"Living Earnestly Today Too"
"The Several Mes Inside My Body"
"Turning Daily Life into Cute Fragments"
"My Emotional Avatar Guide"
The final output drawing prompt must include:
Real subject visual description
Number of Q-version avatars
Actions for each avatar
Journal layout elements
Color atmosphere
Chinese text requirements
Prohibited Items:
Inconsistent characters, face changing, hairstyle changing, clothing changing, color scheme changing, Q-version avatars not resembling the subject, repeating actions, garbled text, messy screens, low resolution, excessive internet-famous filters, horror style, cyberpunk style.
entries.description: A sophisticated system prompt that transforms a reference character into a personalized scrapbook-style poster featuring a central realistic image surrounded by various cute Q-version avatars.

entries.prompt: Create a single 3x3 sprite sheet image containing 9 different simple bust portrait illustrations, matching a gentle Japanese corporate website style. White/off-white background for each cell, consistent navy blue hand-drawn line art, very light pastel clothing fills in pale blue, cream, and soft yellow. Subjects: mix of adult men and women, 20s to 60s, friendly neutral smiles, shoulders visible, centered in each cell with generous but even margins, no cropping, no text, no labels, no borders, no shadows. Each portrait should be easy to crop into a square or vertical avatar. Style should resemble clean minimalist line illustrations used for customer testimonials, warm, calm, professional, not cartoonish, no photorealism. High resolution, exactly 3 columns by 3 rows, consistent scale across all nine portraits.

entries.title: Hanfu Selfie With Privacy Block
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a warm cinematic vertical selfie portrait of a young woman in ornate Chinese hanfu, shot from a high close-up angle with her left arm extended toward the camera. Her face is completely covered by a centered opaque square privacy block in medium warm brown, hiding all facial features. She has dark brown to black hair styled in an elaborate half-up traditional updo with long loose strands falling over both shoulders. Add exactly two large pale aqua-and-white floral hair ornaments, one on each side of the updo, with gold filigree branches, pearl beads, and exactly two long dangling tassel accessories visible, one on the left side and one on the right side. She wears a delicate pale mint blue embroidered hanfu with sheer flowing sleeves, peach-gold floral embroidery, translucent layers, a high collar, and a decorative chest panel with gold trim, pearl-like beads, and a central dangling pale blue pendant. The setting is an intimate traditional East Asian room with warm amber candlelight, wooden window lattice panels in the background, a calligraphy scroll on the left wall with black brush characters, and a glowing paper lantern plus two small candles on a low table. Use shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, warm highlights on hair jewelry, realistic fabric texture, romantic historical-drama styling, and a cozy golden-hour interior atmosphere. Make the composition feel like an accidental elegant selfie, with the sleeve and arm slightly blurred in the foreground and the ornate costume details sharply visible. Use pale mint blue, dark brown to black, warm medium brown, warm amber candlelight, and calligraphy scroll, wooden lattice windows, paper lantern, and two candles.
entries.description: Generates a cinematic traditional Chinese hanfu selfie portrait with ornate hair accessories, warm candlelit room decor, and a face-covering privacy square.

entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed 4:5 portrait "About Me" poster in a premium 3D Fluffy Toy aesthetic, turning the subject from the uploaded photo into an adorable soft-textured collectible character while fully preserving the real facial identity and structure. entries.title: Yukata Girl at Night Festival
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical, photorealistic night festival portrait of an adult Japanese woman standing in a lively summer ennichi street market, shot from mid-thigh upward with a shallow depth of field and warm cinematic bokeh. She wears a pale light lavender-white yukata with pink, blue, and purple cherry-blossom floral print, a wide rose-pink obi sash tied at the back with a visible bow, plus a decorative front cord and flower knot. Her hair is dark brown to black, styled in two low braids/pigtails over the shoulders, with exactly three visible floral hair accessories: one large pink blossom cluster on the right side of her head, one small pink flower cluster near the left shoulder braid, and one small white flower cluster on the right braid. Pose her smiling and playfully lifting the left sleeve outward with her left hand while her right arm extends down and slightly out to the side; emphasize the flowing sleeves, fitted waist, and traditional fabric texture. Place her beside a goldfish-scooping stall on the left with glass or plastic water tanks and trays, glowing paper lanterns, and a large Japanese stall sign reading 金魚すくい; use warm orange lantern light on the skin and fabric, with blurred festival stalls and a walking woman in the background on the right. Composition: subject centered slightly right, close portrait perspective, 3:4 aspect ratio, realistic DSLR photography, 50mm lens look, f/1.8, high detail, natural skin tones, soft highlights, no watermark, no extra text beyond the stall signage.

entries.title: Moonlit Gothic Lolita Balcony
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished anime fantasy illustration of a graceful pink-haired noble girl standing on a moonlit castle balcony at night, shown from mid-thigh up in a vertical composition. She has short fluffy bobbed pink hair with long side bangs partly covering one eye, large ruby-pink eyes, a soft shy smile, pale skin, and delicate features. Add a white flower crown across the top of her hair, a purple flower-shaped hair ornament on the right side, and a small cross hairpin on the left. Dress her in an ornate gothic lolita outfit in black, deep magenta, and rose pink: fitted bodice, puffed skirt with layered ruffles, white frilled blouse details, bow at the collar, capelet over the shoulders, rose brooch at the waist, fine gold chain decorations, embroidered floral trim, white cuffs, and frilly underskirt. Her left hand rests gently near her chest, while her right arm reaches outward toward the viewer with an open palm, elegant but slightly stylized anime fingers. The setting is a romantic European castle terrace with stone balustrades, blooming rose bushes, tall arched windows glowing warm yellow, distant gothic towers, and a large full moon in a deep navy starry sky. Surround her with swirling magical ribbons of pink light and many floating rose petals, including foreground petals blurred for depth. Use cinematic moonlight mixed with warm window glow, soft rim lighting, high detail, glossy anime rendering, dreamy atmosphere, rich magenta highlights, shallow depth of field, and a clean high-resolution illustration style. No text, no watermark, no modern objects.

entries.title: Playful Hanfu Graduation Photo Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, generate a 2x2 collage photoshoot with a 3:4 aspect ratio per image, themed around 'playful Hanfu graduation photo'.

[Character Consistency]
Strictly preserve the user's real identity features, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, age appearance, hairstyle foundation, and overall temperament. In all four small images, it must clearly look like the same real girl, not a stranger, not Westernized, not overly airbrushed, and without an AI 'fake face' look.

[Overall Style]
New Chinese-style graduation photo style popular on Chinese social media, featuring playful, agile, energetic, cute, and pleasing vibes. The image should look like a relaxed and fun set of creative graduation photos suitable for sharing, generally clean and bright with a subtle Chinese sweet aesthetic.

[Makeup]
Sweet and clear youth makeup. Light and transparent base with natural skin color. Eye makeup in light apricot pink, peach pink, or warm brown tones with soft eyeliner and naturally curled lashes. Peach or apple pink blush, and cream pink, peach, or coral lip color. Overall look should be young and lively.

[Hairstyle]
Natural extension of original hair length from uploaded photos, but prioritized for styles that fit graduation caps decorated with flowers.
- Long hair: Semi-updo, double side braids, low double buns, or soft updo with loose strands.
- Mid-length hair: Half-tied, double braids, or low position updo.
- Short hair: Tucked behind ears or French short curls with small flower caps.
Avoid heavy hair covering the cap or face in all four images.

[Clothing & Accessories]
Playful Hanfu graduation outfits in light green, pink-white, light yellow, or milk white colors. Lightweight fabrics with embroidery, wraps, wide sleeves, and pattern details. Must pair with a flower-decorated academic cap or graduation hat with minor tassels.

[Scene & Props]
Clean and bright Chinese-style studio space with beige, warm white, or light wood backgrounds. Decorative elements include cherry blossom branches, small wooden tables, flower vases, books, and scrolls. Props include brushes, scrolls, and wooden quote boards using traditional Chinese calligraphy like 'Happy Graduation' or 'Bright Future'.

[Lighting & Texture]
Soft and bright lighting, overall clear and gentle. Detailed fabric and accessory textures. A slight soft focus effect, but not sharp or commercial advertisement style.

[Fixed 4-Grid Shots]
1. Top-Left: Close-up main vision. Person looking at the camera with a gentle smile, holding a small wooden quote board. Focus on facial identity and cap.
2. Top-Right: Full body pose. Showing the full outfit and cap, holding a brush and scroll with a natural bright smile. Agile posture.
3. Bottom-Left: Playful action shot. 3/4 side view, tilting head or winking to emphasize playfulness.
4. Bottom-Right: Interaction with books/scrolls. Seated or leaning on a table, reading or looking at the camera gently with foreground flowers for depth.

[Consistency]
Keep the person, outfit, cap, makeup, and scene color consistent across all four images.

Her nose is small and exquisite, her lips are soft and rosy with a natural shape, and her overall face is cute, sweet, and refined, like high-quality fantasy character modeling.

She has light blue fluffy long hair, soft and light strands, tied into two loose double-bun hairstyles on top, with slightly messy airy wisps and a few curled strands falling naturally on both sides of her face. The hair color shows rich layers of light blue, silver-blue, and soft white highlights, glowing delicately under warm light. The buns are adorned with white fuzzy hair accessories, small pearls, and delicate gold decorations, adding a sense of dreaminess and cuteness.

She is wearing a white fluffy plush shawl / fur-textured coat, with a soft and thick collar gently wrapping around her neck and shoulders, revealing elegant shoulder lines and collarbones, overall luxurious but restrained. The clothing features delicate gold chains, pearls, and small pendant decorations, with exquisite and luxurious materials and clear, soft plush textures.

The background is a warm and soft indoor space, with golden window light streaming in from the right, the background blurred with warm bokeh and a soft-focus atmosphere, creating a dreamy, warm, and refined sense of luxury. The overall colors are more vivid than ordinary realistic images, with the light blue hair, white plush, and warm golden light forming a sharp but soft contrast.

entries.title: French Style Spring Forest Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate a single high-end portrait in a 3:4 vertical composition based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, with the theme "Spring/Summer window-side forest-style French light boudoir portrait".

[Character Consistency]
Please strictly preserve the user's authentic physical characteristics, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, perceived age, hairstyle foundation, and overall temperament. The result must clearly look like the same real girl, not a stranger, not Westernized, not influencer-style, without excessive skin smoothing or an artificial AI face.

[Core Style]
The overall style is a spring/summer window-side, forest-inspired, French light-retro girl's boudoir photoshoot. The vibe is fresh, soft, quiet, and ethereal, with a hint of laziness, shyness, relaxation, pensiveness, and a sense of being gently wrapped in natural light. The image should look like a candid moment captured by a photographer with a camera in a real bedroom on a spring or early summer afternoon.

[Image Quality & Lighting Focus]
Please prioritize replicating the soft, hazy, glowing texture of a real camera rather than a standard clear AI portrait.

[Makeup]
The makeup should be very light and transparent nude makeup, close to a no-makeup look. The base should be sheer and natural, preserving some real skin texture and natural shadows.

[Clothing]
The clothing should be white, off-white, or beige French-style light boudoir attire, such as lace nightgowns, sheer slip dresses, off-shoulder tulle tops, or soft layered short skirts. Materials should focus on lace, gauze, thin cotton, and soft pleats.
entries.description: A comprehensive system prompt for generating consistent, high-quality French-style forest portraits with a natural camera feel, soft window lighting, and delicate textures.

entries.title: Soap Bubble Elf in Cozy Apartment
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a soft, highly detailed anime-style illustration of a young soap-bubble elf woman with long shimmering silver-lavender hair and pointed ears lounging sideways on a beige sofa in a cozy Japanese apartment living room. She is barefoot with her knees bent, wearing a loose off-shoulder white shirt and pale blue drawstring shorts, holding a silver smartphone in one hand and looking down at it, while a flat opaque taupe square deliberately obscures her face. Her exposed skin and hair are covered in a glossy transparent soap-film sheen, with rainbow iridescent highlights like thin bubbles stretched over her body, especially across her shoulders, arms, legs, chest, and flowing hair. Surround her with exactly 18 floating soap bubbles of different sizes, including one large bubble near the upper left, one large partial bubble in the lower right foreground, one large bubble near the bottom center foreground, several small bubbles around her hair and the room, and a few partial bubbles at the image edges; every bubble should have prismatic reflections. The setting is a warm late-afternoon domestic living room in Jozankei, Japan, with a low round table holding a white mug and a folded newspaper or magazine, a floor heater against the wall, a small kitchen visible through an open doorway, wooden trim, framed wall art, potted plants, pale curtains, a dining table in the background, and travel magazines or books stacked on the floor in the foreground with subtle Japanese text. Use gentle sunlight from the right, muted beige and gray tones, realistic room perspective, delicate painterly rendering, luminous iridescence, dreamy atmosphere, shallow depth of field, and a polished GPT-image-2 anime art finish.

entries.title: Blond Apron Man Serving Heart Omurice
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a warm, romantic anime-style vertical illustration of a tall handsome blond man welcoming the viewer in a rustic fantasy kitchen, shown from mid-torso up and holding out a white plate with both hands. His face is covered by a plain centered square censor block in a skin-tone brown, while his long tousled golden blond hair frames the block and catches the sunlight. He wears a black open-collar shirt with ornate silver embroidery along the collar and placket, sleeves rolled to the forearms, plus a beige apron with shoulder straps, metal rings, and a tied waist. On the plate is exactly one golden folded omurice, glossy and soft, decorated with exactly one red ketchup heart on top and a small green herb garnish at the side. The background is a cozy old-world kitchen with warm afternoon light streaming through one arched window on the left, potted greenery on the sill, a brick hearth glowing on the right, one hanging lantern, exactly two hanging metal pans, wooden shelves, bowls, copper cookware, and a bowl of small red tomatoes near the lower right. Use soft cinematic lighting, detailed painterly linework, delicate highlights, warm amber shadows, shallow depth of field, intimate welcoming composition, high-detail anime illustration, fantasy domestic atmosphere, vertical portrait aspect ratio.

entries.title: Demon Slayer Anime Character Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the uploaded image as the only identity reference and transform the subject into a character rendered in the official Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba anime TV series style. The visual execution must strictly match the Demon Slayer aesthetic, featuring clean and crisp linework, high quality cel shading, and saturated yet balanced colors with a polished TV series anime finish. Do not include any manga style sketching, cross hatching, grayscale, or black and white rendering. The subject's identity must be fully preserved, including their clothing design, hairstyle and hair color, accessories, skin tone, facial expression, and pose, with no replacements or removals of any items.
The existing outfit should be subtly stylized with Demon Slayer Corps inspired detailing, such as sharper fabric folds, slightly reinforced layered textures, and clean anime fabric finishes, while keeping the original outfit clearly recognizable. The character must follow accurate Demon Slayer proportions, including a lean and agile body type, natural anime anatomy, expressive anime eyes with strong highlights, stylized brows, and simplified anime nose and mouth.
The composition is critical and must show the character fully from head to toe, with feet, legs, torso, arms, and head all visible. The framing should not crop any part of the body, and the camera distance must be wide enough to capture the entire figure, leaving a small amount of empty space above the head and below the feet so the character fits comfortably within the frame. The output must be a single full body illustration with the character centered against a plain white background only, with no ground plane, shadows, scenery, props, weapons, objects, effects, aura, particles, motion lines, or environmental details. The final image should contain only the character, and must not include cropped framing, multiple characters, multi panel outputs, other anime styles such as Dragon Ball, Naruto, or One Piece, photorealism, painterly or textured rendering, or any background elements or objects.

entries.title: Summer Selfie Sticker Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please use the uploaded portrait as a reference. Create a 2x2 summer selfie collage with a 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, comprising four panels. Ensure that the facial features remain consistent, with soft, youthful features, a warm smile and natural skin texture. In each panel, depict the character outdoors in bright summer sunshine, wearing a straw hat. Have her strike a variety of poses across the four panels: a peace sign selfie, a pose cupping her face with her hands, an OK gesture, and a relaxed close-up selfie. Keep the composition cute, lively and casual. Add colourful, watercolour-style hand-drawn doodles around her: soft outlines around her body and hat, floating soap bubbles, small hearts, simple sun drawings, sparkles, and cute little animal stickers. Ensure the doodles have a playful, hand-drawn feel, like mobile phone photo stickers. Remove all watermarks, logos, AI labels, app labels and signature marks. Keep the decorative handwritten text, but replace it with neat, legible words such as 'Sheena', 'sunny', 'cute day' and 'summer'. Make 'happy day' the most prominent text. Ensure the text looks like colourful, hand-drawn sticker lettering. Style: Soft Korean/Japanese-style summer selfie aesthetic, bright yet subtle sunlight, fresh colours, a slight film-like softness, a refreshing outdoor atmosphere, cute social media collages, clean ultra-high-resolution images. Elements to remove: Watermarks, logos, brand marks, AI labels, signatures, QR codes, random text, illegible characters, misspelled 'happy day', long captions, cluttered typography, unnecessary people, duplicate faces within a single panel, distorted faces, asymmetrical eyes, plastic-looking skin, excessively smooth skin, blurry faces, lack of detail, unnatural body proportions, distorted hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, twisted arms, severe overexposure, dull colours, severe compression artefacts, dark and underexposed panels.

entries.title: Photo-to-LEGO Minifigure Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the user uploaded image as the only subject reference. Transform the person in the uploaded image into a realistic LEGO style minifigure while preserving their recognizable identity and outfit. Preserve the subject's facial likeness as much as possible within LEGO minifigure design limits, maintaining the same hairstyle and hair color adapted into a LEGO hairpiece, facial expression, clothing colors, clothing design and patterns, and any visible accessories. The result should clearly represent the same person translated into LEGO form. The character must follow authentic LEGO minifigure proportions, including a cylindrical yellow or skin tone LEGO style head, simple printed facial features adapted from the subject, a block shaped torso with printed clothing details, standard LEGO minifigure arms with curved hands, short LEGO minifigure legs, and a distinct molded plastic hairpiece matching the subject's hairstyle.
Render the figure using realistic LEGO plastic material with a slight glossy sheen, subtle molded seams, and natural toy surface reflections. The face and torso should include printed details typical of LEGO minifigures, and the hairpiece should appear as molded plastic. The final image should be a high quality realistic 3D toy render with soft diffused studio lighting, subtle shadows that emphasize shape and plastic texture, and clean sharp focus with crisp detail. The framing must show the full body minifigure from head to feet in a centered composition with the entire figure fully visible. Use a plain white background with no scenery, no props, and no additional elements. The final style should feel like a photorealistic LEGO minifigure toy render with highly detailed plastic texture and studio lighting.
entries.description: A sophisticated prompt that transforms a reference portrait into a realistic, photorealistic LEGO minifigure while maintaining facial identity.

entries.title: Aesthetic Gamer Girl Streamer
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A front-facing medium close-up webcam/live-streaming shot of a gamer girl seated at a cozy bedroom desk, bathed in soft purple and blue neon lighting. The scene carries a dreamy, cool-toned ambiance with blended lavender and deep navy hues, while a gentle glow from the screen subtly illuminates her face.
She has long, wavy black hair with striking silver/white streaked bangs, softly framing her face with light, wispy strands. She wears a stylish cat-ear gaming headset with an attached microphone.
Her makeup is soft yet eye-catching: large, glossy eyes, a delicate pink blush, faint freckles across her cheeks, sharp eyeliner, and smooth gradient lips. She's dressed in an oversized light gray sweater layered with a subtle silver necklace, paired with black knit gloves and long, glossy black nails.
She holds a pastel purple game controller, while her other hand lightly touches her headset or brushes through her hair. Her lips are slightly parted, and she gazes directly into the camera with a calm, dreamy, slightly tired expression. The background enhances the cozy cyber aesthetic with soft LED lights, neatly arranged cute shelf decor, posters, glowing heart-shaped accents, and pastel gaming elements. A subtle live-stream overlay with chat comments and a glowing "LIVE" indicator adds realism, creating an intimate, aesthetic streaming atmosphere.
entries.description: A dreamy, high-detail prompt for a neon-lit streaming atmosphere featuring a gamer girl with wavy hair and cat-ear headphones.

entries.prompt: A vertical ultra-photorealistic cinematic portrait in 9:13 aspect ratio of a young handsome man with dark styled hair, sharp jawline, and defined features standing confidently in a dense misty forest at golden hour, facing the camera with a relaxed fearless warm smile. entries.title: Minimalist Cave Painting Style Avatar
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform the input image into a 1:1 minimalist symbolic line illustration suitable for social media avatars. The subject can be a person, animal, or plant. Do not replicate the exact form, describe details, or use complete outlines. Instead, like early murals or primitive carvings, extract the most essential expression, posture, and contour features of the subject, leaving marks with a minimal number of lines. The goal is not to draw the whole subject but to create a refined symbolic image where just a few strokes reveal its temperament and charm.

The number of lines must be extremely small, ideally within 3 to 6 strokes. Every stroke should be simple, direct, and decisive, as if drawn in one go, with natural pauses and slight fluctuations. It should not be mechanical, polished, overly smooth, or form a modern logo-style closed outline. Allow for breaks, white space, and omissions to participate in the expression. Do not draw facial details, hair texture, clothing folds, leaf veins, or other explanatory details; retain only the most critical contour turns and expressive pivot points.

The overall vibe should be primitive, direct, restrained, and accurate, like a primal visual language. The background should remain simple, quiet, and steady, using a deep red, stone wall color, gray-white, dark tone, or other plain colors that can highlight the lines. The main lines should be clear, simple, and have a sense of presence. Avoid realism, shadows, volume, complex decorations, or modern graphic design styles. The final effect should be an extremely refined symbolic mark: minimal, accurate, powerful, and quiet, extracting the essence of the subject in just a few strokes.
entries.description: A creative prompt for generating highly minimalist line art avatars inspired by prehistoric cave paintings, focusing on essential spirit and posture rather than detail.

entries.title: Minimalist Single Line Social Media Avatar
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please transform the input image into a minimalist single-line illustration suitable for social media avatars, with a default aspect ratio of 1:1. The subject can be a person, cat, dog, other animals, or plants. Based on the input subject type, automatically extract the most recognizable outer contours and key features, and summarize them into an artistic, minimalist single-line avatar/image illustration. The overall goal is not mechanical outlining, but retaining the subject's charm and recognizability, reconstructing it with higher elegance and spirit through single lines. [Subject Processing Logic] If the subject is a person: retain key contours such as face shape, forehead, bridge of the nose, mouth transitions, chin, ears, hairstyle, keeping only necessary facial features to avoid cluttered details. If the subject is an animal: retain head shape, ears, muzzle contours, eye expressions, and the main flow of fur to avoid complex details. If the subject is a plant: retain the most recognizable morphological features of flowers, leaves, branches, or fruits, summarizing their posture and rhythm with simple lines. [Line Style Requirements] Lines must be smooth, rounded, stretched, bold, and natural, as continuous as possible, with a sense of breath and improvisation. Use soft arcs mainly, avoiding sharp, stiff, or rigid lines. Do not draw as a rigid logo-style outline. Lines should be simple but vital, with a touch of casual artistic flair, looking relaxed and collectible. [Composition and Avatar Adaptation] 1:1 square design. The subject should be clear, concentrated, and prominent. Centered or slightly centered composition with clear visual focus and sufficient white space. [Background Logic] Do not fix the color to one type (not always blue). Select dark-toned background logic based on the image's temperament. Avoid neon or cheap bright colors. [Line Color Logic] Use thin white lines or light-colored lines contrasting with the background. [Embellishment Logic] Add small, random, colorful dots, arcs, stars, or geometric symbols to enhance spirit and fun. Keep them sparse and natural. [Overall Goal] Minimalist, light, modern, and artistic. Suitable for social media: eye-catching, recognizable, and fun. [Avoid] Realism, shadows, textures, complex scenes, mechanical outlining. entries.searchText: minimalist single line social media avatar a comprehensive system-style prompt to transform any input photo into a minimalist, artistic single-line drawing optimized for social media avatars. please transform the input image into a minimalist single-line illustration suitable for social media avatars, with a default aspect ratio of 1:1. the subject can be a person, cat, dog, other animals, or plants. based on the input subject type, automatically extract the most recognizable outer contours and key features, and summarize them into an artistic, minimalist single-line avatar/image illustration. the overall goal is not mechanical outlining, but retaining the subject's charm and recognizability, reconstructing it with higher elegance and spirit through single lines. [subject processing logic] if the subject is a person: retain key contours such as face shape, forehead, bridge of the nose, mouth transitions, chin, ears, hairstyle, keeping only necessary facial features to avoid cluttered details. if the subject is an animal: retain head shape, ears, muzzle contours, eye expressions, and the main flow of fur to avoid complex details. if the subject is a plant: retain the most recognizable morphological features of flowers, leaves, branches, or fruits, summarizing their posture and rhythm with simple lines. [line style requirements] lines must be smooth, rounded, stretched, bold, and natural, as continuous as possible, with a sense of breath and improvisation. use soft arcs mainly, avoiding sharp, stiff, or rigid lines. do not draw as a rigid logo-style outline. lines should be simple but vital, with a touch of casual artistic flair, looking relaxed and collectible. [composition and avatar adaptation] 1:1 square design. the subject should be clear, concentrated, and prominent. centered or slightly centered composition with clear visual focus and sufficient white space. [background logic] do not fix the color to one type (not always blue). select dark-toned background logic based on the image's temperament. avoid neon or cheap bright colors. [line color logic] use thin white lines or light-colored lines contrasting with the background. [embellishment logic] add small, random, colorful dots, arcs, stars, or geometric symbols to enhance spirit and fun. keep them sparse and natural. [overall goal] minimalist, light, modern, and artistic. suitable for social media: eye-catching, recognizable, and fun. [avoid] realism, shadows, textures, complex scenes, mechanical outlining. ratio 16:9 profile / avatar

entries.title: Ethereal Night Selfie Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Super close up, extra details, low quality night selfie. In a vertical 9:16 reverie, the canvas is dominated by the luminous presence of a young woman in her early twenties, her features a study in ethereal symmetry and porcelain grace characteristic of Northern European frost. Her face is framed by a cascading veil of long, platinum blonde hair that catches a warm, golden light from the side, creating a halo of delicate, stray wisps that dance against the deep, obsidian void of the night. Her eyes, deep and captivating with a subtle feline tilt, are accentuated by soft, winged eyeliner and a hint of shimmer at the inner corners, gazing forward with a tranquil, mesmerizing depth. The skin of her face is flawless and radiant, possessing a soft-focus perfection that highlights high, elegant cheekbones and a straight, refined nose. Her lips, full and naturally flushed with a dusty rose hue, are set in a soft, enigmatic expression that enhances her supermodel-like allure. She is dressed in a simple white top layered under a heather gray zip-up hoodie, the metallic teeth of the zipper catching the light and adding a tactile contrast to the softness of her hair and skin. Her build appears lithe and delicate, posed with a natural poise that commands the frame even in this intimate close-up. The light source, positioned to her right, casts a gentle gradient of warmth across her features while leaving the left side in a soft, cinematic shadow, rooting the composition in a moment of quiet, nocturnal beauty.

entries.title: Monochrome Anime Couple Sketch
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a monochrome rough hand-drawn anime line-art illustration on a clean white background, as if sketched with a fine dip pen. Show two close-up characters in an intimate couple pose: a shorter youthful character on the left with messy short hair and a loose hoodie with drawstrings, leaning upward toward a taller character on the right; the taller character has very long flowing hair, visible ear detail, and a loose kimono-like robe, bending down close to the shorter character as if about to kiss or whisper. Keep the faces deliberately covered by two soft light-gray rectangular censor blocks, one medium rectangle over the left character's face and one larger vertical rectangle over the taller character's face, partially overlapping near the center. Use loose, energetic black sketch lines with visible construction strokes, delicate hair strands, minimal shading, and a light airy feeling. Add a small hand-drawn heart on the left side and three short emphasis marks near the taller character's head on the upper right. Place elegant cursive text in the upper left reading Mai & Koyo. Add a faint circular watermark-like emblem behind the characters and a bold copyright line along the bottom reading ©ImaginaryGate | ProjectMRA | Mai. Overall composition should be horizontal, close-cropped, romantic, black-and-white, sketchbook-style, with the taller character dominating the right side and the shorter character filling the lower left.
entries.description: A rough black-and-white anime couple line drawing suitable for romantic character art, social posts, or monochrome illustration concepts.

entries.title: Sunlit Spring Blossom Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a fresh, romantic, slightly cinematic spring portrait of a young woman standing beneath blooming white cherry or apple blossom branches. The subject is framed from chest up in a low-angle close portrait, centered, wearing a simple white sleeveless sundress with a soft V neckline. She has medium brown hair parted in the middle and styled into two loose braids falling over her shoulders, with a single white blossom tucked behind one ear. Surround her with dense white blossoms, green leaves, dark tree branches, and a vivid blue sky. Place the bright spring sun directly behind the top of her head, creating golden backlight, glowing hair rim light, lens flare, warm haze, and high-contrast dappled sunlight on her shoulders and dress. Add a few white petals drifting across the foreground, soft bokeh blossoms in the background, and a dreamy airy atmosphere. Use photorealistic editorial portrait photography, natural skin tones, 35mm lens look, shallow depth of field, crisp foreground detail, cinematic color grading, fresh romantic mood, vertical 4:5 composition. No text, no watermark, no extra people.

entries.title: Raden Lacquerware Style Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please transform this illustration into a fantastical Raden lacquerware style. Inlay countless thin flakes of mother-of-pearl onto a deep jet-black background, maximizing the iridescent play-of-color that shines strongly depending on the light angle. Emphasize the beautiful shell reflections and shifting colors particularly in the highlights of the character's eyes and hair. However, keep the Raden subtle on the face and skin to maintain a natural and beautiful appearance. Create a mysterious, dreamlike, noble, and elegant atmosphere like a treasure. Achieve a breathtaking beauty that combines delicate craftsmanship and luxury. Completely maintain the original composition and character.

entries.title: Censored Chibi AI Engineer
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean kawaii anime chibi illustration on a white background featuring a young male AI engineer crouching in the center, wearing a blue blazer, black shirt, black pants, and black sneakers, with short fluffy black hair, one small black earring, and a large opaque beige square censor block covering the entire face from forehead to chin. The pose is relaxed and thoughtful: one hand near the mouth, the other hand resting near the knee, body squatting low. Surround him with exactly 8 cute AI and technology elements: 1 green rounded-square tile with a white GPT-style knot logo on the left, 1 light-blue rounded-square chatbot icon below it, 1 open laptop at bottom left with a smiling face on the screen, 1 pale blue molecular network diagram at upper left, 1 dark floating analytics dashboard at upper right with connected nodes, 1 purple rounded-square creative palette icon at mid-right, 1 tiny white round robot mascot at bottom right with blue glowing eyes, and 1 small pale blue wireframe cube near the robot. Add scattered decorative accents: yellow sparkles, blue motion lines, small pastel dots, and tiny circles. Use polished digital art, soft shading, crisp linework, glossy icon highlights, pastel blue and lavender accents, centered composition, no text, no watermark, friendly modern AI mascot aesthetic.

entries.title: High-Angle Summer Street Selfie
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the uploaded portrait as the facial identity reference. Create a highly realistic 9:16 smartphone selfie of a young woman standing on a quiet residential street. The phone is raised high, shooting from a downward selfie angle. She looks up naturally at the camera with a soft, fresh, girl-next-door expression. She has long dark twin ponytails, loose wispy hair strands, fair smooth skin, natural makeup, and a slim natural figure.
She wears a white spaghetti-strap camisole, light pink shorts, white socks, and white Crocs-style clogs. Show her upper body, shorts, legs, socks, and shoes clearly. The background features red brick apartment buildings, balconies, air conditioners, roadside greenery, trees, and a clean road extending into the distance. Bright soft natural daylight, realistic skin texture, casual summer vibe, photorealistic phone selfie, no text, no watermark

Negative Prompt:
low quality, blurry, overexposed, distorted face, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, unnatural body proportions, plastic skin, heavy makeup, cartoon, anime, CGI, fake background, messy composition, cropped feet, missing shoes, text, logo, watermark

entries.title: Anime Techwear Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a visually striking anime-inspired poster of the subject from their original series, redesigned through a fusion of modern streetwear, techwear fashion, and premium Japanese graphic design. The artwork should feel like a high-end fashion campaign mixed with an anime movie poster and futuristic editorial artwork. Study the character's original personality and emotional energy carefully before generating the scene. Their body language, expression, styling, effects, and composition should all reflect who they truly are in canon. Reimagine the original costume into a stylish streetwear / techwear outfit while keeping recognizable identity details from the source material. Use layered jackets, tactical straps, oversized silhouettes, futuristic sneakers, utility accessories, cyber-fashion details, and subtle references to their powers or world. Pose design should match the character archetype. Expression must feel emotionally authentic and cinematic - sharp anime eyes, subtle emotion, believable attitude, premium character presence. Visual style: Anime × streetwear × cyber graphic design, Clean lineart, Semi-flat shading with selective high-detail rendering, Sharp contrast, Minimal but impactful composition, Modern Japanese poster aesthetic, Fashion-editorial energy, Highly polished anime illustration. Composition: Vertical 3:4 format, Off-center character placement, Strong diagonal composition flow, Layered depth and dynamic framing, Large intentional negative space, Stylish typography integration, Asymmetrical modern layout. Colors: Clean white or soft neutral background, Use the character's signature canon color as the main accent, Add one complementary secondary accent, Minimal color palette, Bold contrast with controlled saturation, Accent colors integrated into lighting, effects, and graphic elements. Background design: Abstract geometric layouts, Japanese typography, Minimal UI / cyber-tech graphics, Ink strokes, paint splashes, energy marks, Subtle world-building references, Premium poster balance without clutter. Effects: Energy trails, Motion strokes, Glow accents, Atmospheric particles, Paint textures, Effects should visually match the character's power system and emotional tone. Lighting: Sharp cinematic lighting, Clean hard shadows, Controlled rim light, Soft colored glow from the signature accent color, Premium editorial contrast. Rendering: Ultra-detailed anime illustration, Clean vector-like finish, 4K poster quality, Highly polished key visual, Stylish

entries.title: Korean Magazine Style Couple Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Shoot a double half-body close-up couple portrait. The boy is in the front, and the girl naturally approaches from the side-rear, gently leaning her head near his shoulder and neck. The two are very close, but not stiff; it should look like the girl is naturally leaning in and the boy is naturally accepting her closeness. Emotion Setting: This is a quiet, gentle shot of relationship-building with a sense of trust. The boy looks at the camera with calm, gentle, and stable eyes, as if naturally sustaining the relationship; the girl looks lightly at the camera or slightly at the boy's profile with soft eyes, a hint of dependence, and a slight smile. No exaggerated laughter, just the natural relaxation of a long-term relationship. Expression and Angle: Not both facing standard forward. The boy can be slightly forward-facing, while the girl's face emerges from the back, maintaining a slight staggered relationship. Restrained expressions, corners of the mouth slightly upturned with a quiet warmth. Composition: Medium close-up, highlighting the distance between the two, facial relationship, and shoulder-neck proximity. Background is a warm gray pure studio background with soft and even lighting. The overall look is like the first page of a Korean magazine photoshoot used to establish relationships.
entries.description: A gentle and stable couple portrait prompt for magazine-style photography, emphasizing subtle emotions and soft lighting.

entries.title: Korean Magazine Couple Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Based on the clear photos of two adult couples uploaded by the user, generate a Korean-style couple magazine studio photo shoot. Strictly preserve the real identity characteristics of both individuals, including face shape, feature proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, age, hairstyle, and overall temperament. The result must clearly look like the same couple, not strangers, and avoid Westernization or excessive beautification. Use the uploaded photos only for character reference; do not retain the original background, clothing, or composition. The style should be: minimalist studio shoot, gentle, natural, quiet, and intimate, like a fashion magazine spread. Backgrounds should be seamless studio backdrops in light gray, warm gray, or cream. Lighting should be soft studio light. Clothing direction: charcoal gray knit for the man, warm orange fuzzy knit for the woman. Emphasize eye contact, emotion, and the relationship, showing trust, relaxation, and natural intimacy. Avoid mechanical poses. Expressions should range from faint smiles and quiet relaxation to being genuinely amused or caught in a shy moment. Ensure varied angles and compositions to feel like different moments from a single shoot. Maintain realistic body proportions and head-to-body ratios for adults. Ensure natural limb interaction (hugging, holding hands) without AI artifacts. Negative constraints: no hollow eyes, repetitive smiles, excessive drama, or distorted body structures.

entries.title: Cool Chibi Demon Girl Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dynamic 3D anime chibi character poster on a clean teal background, viewed from a high overhead three-quarter angle with strong studio lighting and a soft cast shadow. Show one cute demon-girl character named かなえちゃん: a small chibi body with an oversized head, glossy black twin ponytails whipping outward in long flowing arcs, two curved turquoise segmented horns, bright golden eyes, tiny fangs, round black sunglasses worn low on her face, and a playful confident smile. She wears a black satin sukajan-style bomber jacket with ornate embroidered golden dragon artwork across the back and sleeves, a short black pleated skirt, teal dragon-scale thigh-high stockings, dark shoes, and a thin reptilian tail with teal scales curling behind her. The pose should have her turned back over her shoulder toward the viewer, arms tucked near her chest, giving a cool mischievous idol-mascot feeling. At the bottom foreground, add one large piece of thick extruded Japanese 3D text reading かなえちゃん, in warm cream lettering with dark navy sides and a strong perspective shadow, angled upward across the lower edge. Use crisp cel-shaded anime rendering mixed with polished toy-like 3D depth, high detail in hair highlights, horn texture, dragon embroidery, and scale patterns, with a vivid turquoise color palette and no extra background objects.

entries.title: Q-Style Sticker Diary Clone
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on the uploaded photo, generate a high-quality "Q-version Clone Sticker Diary Photo."

[Subject Positioning] A model shooting scene with a real-life model as the central subject, presenting a high-resolution social media lifestyle diary style. The image should be exquisite and playful, with a balanced layout and a rich yet uncluttered visual feel.

[Q-version Clone Design] Add 5-8 Q-version mini clones around the subject, using a cute sticker style with "large heads and small bodies + large expressive eyes + clean digital art style." Each clone must maintain high similarity to the real person-hairstyles, clothing, and colors must be identical-but they should be designed with different photography-related poses and expressions (such as hands on hips, wearing a hat, jumping, back view, lying down, etc.), ensuring all poses are distinct and fit the shooting context.

[Visual Effects] Each Q-version character should be rendered as a sticker with a white outline, soft shadows, and a slight floating effect, arranged around the subject and the edges of the frame, avoiding obstruction of the face or key body parts.

[Doodle Elements] Add light hand-drawn doodles (hearts, sparkles, arrows, dynamic lines, circles) using a white base with light pink accents, maintaining a simple scrapbook diary style that blends naturally with the overall image.

[Text Design] Include 5-8 short handwritten-style English phrases fitting the shooting atmosphere. The text should be primarily white with slight pink highlights and small decorative symbols (like stars or wavy lines), positioned to coordinate with the doodles without obstructing the subject.

[Composition Requirements] The real-life subject is centered, with Q-version stickers and doodle elements radiating around them, forming a balanced "subject-centered, element-surrounded" layout. The overall look is an exquisite and playful high-resolution social media lifestyle diary style, visually rich but without clutter.

entries.title: Ethereal Cloud Portrait Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform this image (Uploaded) into a soft, atmospheric cloud composition while preserving the subject's recognizable facial features, expression, and identity.
The face should appear subtly formed from clouds, blending naturally into a bright blue sky background. Use soft, diffused lighting with gentle highlights and airy shadows to create depth and realism.
Ensure the transformation is symbolic rather than literal ,avoid hard edges, skin texture, or sharp details. The subject should feel like it is emerging from or dissolving into the clouds.

Style: dreamy, ethereal, surreal, cinematic
Lighting: natural sunlight, soft glow, volumetric light
Color palette: sky blue, white, soft gradients
Mood: peaceful, uplifting, inspirational
Add subtle cloud layers around and within the face for a seamless blend. Background should be a clean blue sky with soft cloud gradients.
High resolution, ultra-realistic cloud texture, smooth blending, no text, no watermark.
