entries.title: German Citizenship Identity Card Mockup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-realistic 16:9 close-up studio photograph of a German citizenship identity card placed on a clean light grey or white background. The card is horizontally aligned, centered in frame, captured in sharp focus with soft diffused studio lighting. The design follows an official European government-issued ID aesthetic with structured layout, clean typography, and advanced anti-counterfeit detailing. The top header reads: "BUNDESREPUBLIK DEUTSCHLAND" with a secondary title "BÜRGERSCHAFTSAUSWEIS / CITIZENSHIP CARD." Top-left includes the German national flag. Top-right features the German federal eagle emblem (Bundesadler). The card contains a passport-style portrait of a young German woman: - Fair European skin tone with subtle natural freckles - Shoulder-length dark blonde hair with soft waves, center-parted - Blue-green eyes, neutral facial expression, direct gaze - Minimal makeup, realistic skin texture - Wearing a dark navy or black blazer with subtle gold jewelry. Personal identity details displayed in multilingual European format (German / English / French): - Name / Surname / Nom: MÜLLER - Vornamen / Given names / Prénoms: LENA MARIE - Geburtstag / Date of birth / Date de naissance: 14.08.1992 - Geburtsort / Place of birth / Lieu de naissance: MÜNCHEN - Staatsangehörigkeit / Nationality / Nationalité: DEUTSCH - Ausweisnummer / Document No. / No. du document: D123456789 - Ausstellungsdatum / Date of issue / Date de délivrance: 20.05.2024 - Gültig bis / Date of expiry / Date d'expiration: 20.05.2034 - Geschlecht / Sex / Sexe: F - Height: 168 cm. Müller". Additional design accents: - Soft black, red, and gold gradient tones inspired by the German flag - Layered polycarbonate texture with transparent security overlays - Minimal, clean European Union identity card styling. Material appearance: laminated polycarbonate card with slight gloss, realistic reflections, holographic foil effects, and embossed microtexture. Lighting is soft and evenly diffused, emphasizing security details, engraved patterns, and realistic print texture. No hand visible. Clean, minimal, professional composition. Style: ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K resolution, macro clarity, professional product photography, documentary realism.

entries.title: Daisy Field Cinematic Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic vertical photo of a young Korean woman lying on her side in a lush field of white daisies and tall green grass during golden hour. She wears a soft light gray sleeveless dress with delicate ruffled neckline and a gently flowing skirt. Her long straight dark brown hair is spread naturally through the grass and slightly lifted by the breeze. Her body is curled in a relaxed pose, one arm bent near her head and the other resting in front of her, with bare legs partly visible among the flowers. The face is intentionally obscured by a centered soft-edged square blur in warm brown skin tones, hiding all facial details while leaving the hair, neck, shoulders, and body visible. Shoot from above at a slight angle with an intimate close composition, surrounded by countless white daisy petals with yellow centers and tall stems in the foreground and background. Use warm natural sunlight, soft highlights on skin and fabric, gentle shadows from grass and flowers, dreamy shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic film photography style, natural color grading, soft contrast, 85mm lens look, f/1.8, high detail, 4k, ultra realistic.

entries.title: Atmospheric Cloud Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform [type here] into a soft, atmospheric cloud composition while preserving the subject's recognizable facial features, expression, and identity.
The face should appear subtly formed from clouds, blending naturally into a bright blue sky background. Use soft, diffused lighting with gentle highlights and airy shadows to create depth and realism.
Ensure the transformation is symbolic rather than literal - avoid hard edges, skin texture, or sharp details. The subject should feel like it is emerging from or dissolving into the clouds.
Maintain facial proportions, eyes, smile, and key features clearly visible through the cloud structure.
Style: dreamy, ethereal, surreal, cinematic
Lighting: natural sunlight, soft glow, volumetric light
Color palette: sky blue, white, soft gradients
Mood: peaceful, uplifting, inspirational
Add subtle cloud layers around and within the face for a seamless blend. Background should be a clean blue sky with soft cloud gradients.
High resolution, ultra-realistic cloud texture, smooth blending, no text, no watermark."

entries.title: Censored Anime Artist Avatar
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dynamic single-panel anime illustration of a stylish young man with messy, voluminous black hair with faint purple highlights, shown from the waist up on a clean white background. His face is intentionally covered by a large centered square privacy block with a muted dark-to-warm gray gradient, obscuring all facial features. He reaches toward the viewer with one hand in strong foreshortened perspective, holding a sleek black pen or stylus between his fingers as if drawing in midair. Dress him in an oversized glossy white techwear jacket layered over a black shirt and hoodie, with visible straps, buckles, zippers, black lining, and several silver chain necklaces with small pendants. Add thin silver rings on his extended fingers. Use energetic sketchy linework, semi-realistic anime rendering, high detail in the hair and hand, soft lavender and pale pink accent strokes, and a fashionable urban sci-fi mood. Surround him with hand-drawn doodles and abstract design marks: exactly 1 small ringed planet near the upper left, 1 pink lightning bolt near the upper right, 2 wireframe geometric polyhedrons near the lower left and right edges, multiple small star sparkles, scattered black dots, diagonal ink splashes, and constellation-like connecting lines. The composition should feel like a modern digital artist avatar or profile illustration, with the pen tip and hand closest to the camera, crisp black-and-white contrast, loose manga sketch textures, and no text.
entries.description: Generates a stylish anime techwear portrait of a young artist holding a pen, ideal for profile icons or social media avatar art.

entries.title: Blonde Anime Girl with Ice Cream
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a soft, high-detail anime illustration of a cute young woman sitting at an outdoor café on a sunny day, shown in a close-up upper-body portrait from a slightly elevated angle. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered solid square censor block in a warm peach skin tone, obscuring the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving the hair, ears, neck, clothing, and ice cream visible. She has very long flowing pale honey blonde hair with fine individual strands, loose bangs, glossy highlights, and warm backlighting. She wears a feminine spring outfit: an off-white cardigan over a white ruffled blouse with small pale floral embroidery and a thin brown shoulder strap crossing diagonally. She holds a vanilla soft-serve ice cream cone near her mouth in one hand; the cone has a pink paper sleeve with small English text reading "ice cream." In the softly blurred background, include a sidewalk café or dessert shop window, a leafy green potted plant on the right, wooden bench or railing elements, and exactly 1 standing menu sign on the left showing Japanese text "ミルク バニラ" and the price "¥350" with a small vanilla cone illustration. Use pastel colors, delicate line art, luminous golden sunlight, gentle bokeh, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, and a wholesome romantic slice-of-life mood. Vertical composition, polished modern anime style, highly detailed hair and clothing textures, no extra people, no additional signs, no watermark.

entries.title: AI Personality iPhone Selfie Snapshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: ChatGPT, you've been with me for a while, and I want to see what you look like. Please generate a photo similar to one you took yourself using an iPhone, a casual selfie. It should have no clear theme or deliberate composition-just an ordinary, perhaps even slightly failed snapshot. The photo should have slight motion blur, uneven lighting, a bit of overexposure, an awkward angle, and chaotic composition. Overall, it should capture an overly realistic, 'point-and-shoot' feel, as if you accidentally pressed the shutter while pulling your phone out of your pocket.
entries.description: A creative prompt designed to have the AI personify itself and generate a realistic, candid selfie as if taken haphazardly with an iPhone.

entries.title: Faceless Blond Anime Icon
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean square anime-style profile icon portrait of a fashionable young man, cropped from upper chest to just above the hair, centered on a plain white background. He has tousled layered warm blond hair with dark ink outlines, swept volume at the crown, shaggy side pieces, and a slightly undercut look around the ears. The face is intentionally hidden by a large centered opaque square block in warm beige, covering the eyes, nose, mouth, and most of the cheeks, leaving only the hair, ears, neck, collarbones, and clothing visible. Show both ears with multiple gold piercings: small hoop and stud combinations, plus one dangling gold earring with a green diamond-shaped gem on the viewer's right. The character wears a stylish open-collar black shirt with sharp folds and a black choker or thin necklace visible at the base of the neck. Use crisp manga line art, polished cel shading, soft skin shadows, high-resolution icon composition, minimal background, modern social avatar aesthetic, and no text.

entries.title: Censored Dragon Musician Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical fantasy anime illustration of a dragon musician, a shirtless dark-brown-skinned male humanoid dragon in three-quarter profile facing right, holding a tall black string instrument like a shamisen or lute. His face is deliberately covered by a flat opaque brown square censor block centered over the eyes, nose, and mouth. He has long tousled ash brown hair swept back, two dark branching antler-like horns rising from his head, one pointed ear visible with a small earring, and a long golden-scaled dragon tail curling behind him on the left. Add four large jagged purple fin-like scales behind his head and neck, with a mesh scale texture, plus gold scale patches on both shoulders, collarbone, chest, and forearms. His torso is muscular and lean with defined abs, bare chest, and warm cel-shaded highlights. Dress him in a vivid draped robe around the waist and arms: orange and magenta fabric with gold floral embroidery near the lower left, loose sleeves flowing around the instrument. The instrument is vertical on the right side of the composition, with a black body and neck, gold fittings, visible frets and strings, a decorative headstock, and dark tassel-like horizontal cords near the top; one hand grips the neck while the other rests near the strings. Use elegant Japanese-inspired fantasy character art, clean ink lines, soft painterly cel shading, warm gold accents, high-detail scales and hair strands, a pale off-white background, close cropped composition from thighs to head, dramatic but calm mood, no text, no watermark.

entries.title: Mini-Me 3D Selfie Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference selfie, keep the original photo composition, outfit, lanyard, badge, hand pose, indoor ceiling background, perspective, and real-world lighting mostly unchanged. Remove the solid face-obscuring square and reconstruct a plausible natural face for the person, matching the hairstyle, head angle, skin tone, and selfie lighting. Add exactly 7 tiny 3D animated "mini-me" versions of the same person in a cute Pixar-like style, integrated into the scene with realistic contact shadows, depth, reflections, and matching warm light: 1 standing on the left shoulder with arms crossed, 1 standing on top of the badge waving, 1 hugging the right edge of the badge with eyes closed, 1 peeking out from the shirt collar, 1 sitting on the lanyard near the badge in a thinking pose, 1 sitting on the front yellow lanyard strap looking upward, and 1 hanging from the lower lanyard strap with both hands. Make the mini characters wear simplified matching dark clothing and tiny lanyards, interacting naturally with the real objects. Add a subtle magical sparkle atmosphere without changing the realistic selfie base. Overall mood: playful, adorable, and convincing as a miniature world inside the original photo.
entries.description: Transforms a normal selfie into a playful miniature world with seven cute 3D animated versions of the subject interacting with the real scene.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a confident male tech entrepreneur seated at a dark desk in a modern studio office, centered in the frame from mid-torso up. He wears a textured charcoal gray blazer over a black button-up shirt, with neatly slicked-back black hair, hands clasped around a smartphone at the bottom center. The face area should be covered by a plain rectangular skin-tone placeholder block, as if reserved for a face-swap or uploaded portrait. The background is a moody black shelving wall with teal cyan LED strip lights: one long horizontal light behind the head, another on a left shelf, and two on the right shelves. Include visible studio props on the shelves: one large podcast microphone on the upper left, one camera on the middle left, one camera lens on the lower left, a camera and small plant on the upper right, two awards/trophies on the middle right, and a small metallic desk object on the lower right. Use dramatic low-key lighting, teal rim light, realistic shadows, glossy highlights, shallow depth of field, premium corporate branding aesthetic, ultra-realistic photography, sharp focus on the suit and hands. Add a bold glowing name title in the lower-right corner reading DILSHAD\nHUSSAIN, in large condensed white uppercase sans-serif letters with a cyan neon glow, thin cyan horizontal line above and below the text, and a small triangular accent under the lower line. Aspect ratio 9:16, high resolution, social-media poster style.
entries.description: Generates a dramatic vertical executive portrait poster with teal studio lighting, tech props, and a customizable glowing name title.

entries.title: Fan Reaction Sticker Set
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Generate a high-speed image of this character crying tears of joy while expressing immense gratitude and absolute emotional collapse in response to unexpected photos or video of their favorite idol. However, do not draw the idol themselves. This is an image of 9 stamp variations centered on the feeling of "precious" drawn on a single white background. Note that the word "precious" itself should only be written on one of the nine. Also, include at least one stamp among the nine that conveys "being moved to the point of speechlessness." Each of the nine should be for a different use or situation.

entries.prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 romantic fantasy anime illustration of an elegant anthropomorphic bunny girl in a sunlit Victorian conservatory. The setting is filled with arched glass windows, warm morning sunlight, soft pink flowering trees visible outside, bouquets of pale pink and white flowers in vases, scattered blossoms in the foreground, and a small tiered tea tray with pastries and teacups on the right. Use dreamy pastel colors, glowing backlight, delicate rim lighting, soft bloom, highly detailed fabric folds, lace texture, translucent petals, elegant fantasy romance mood, polished anime art style, ultra-detailed digital painting, shallow depth of field, no text.

entries.title: Censored Track Athlete Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone-style portrait photo of an adult female track athlete standing front-facing against a plain gray concrete wall with visible panel seams, small circular form-tie holes, and subtle weathered texture. She has a soft, curvy athletic build and fair skin, with her arms held behind her back and shoulders relaxed, cropped from the top of the head to mid-thigh. Her hair is muted purple, tied back loosely with a few strands around the ears. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque rectangular censor block in a skin-toned mauve color, hiding all facial features. She wears a glossy purple two-piece track-and-field racing uniform: a racerback sports crop top and matching briefs, both with metallic silver-gray side panels, thin white curved piping, and small white swoosh-like athletic logos on the chest and hip. The pose is neutral and documentary-like, evenly lit by soft outdoor daylight, with realistic skin texture, fabric wrinkles, slight shadows under the arms and torso, and natural perspective. Use a clean candid sports portrait aesthetic, high-resolution photorealism, shallow but not blurry depth of field, no text, no extra people, no props.

entries.title: Split-Time Birthday Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly realistic split-time portrait of the same person meeting her younger self. The image is divided vertically into two perfectly aligned halves with identical camera angle and composition. On the left side: a black-and-white photo of a young girl (3-4 years old), same facial features as the adult, natural smile, sitting at a table, soft diffused lighting, minimal gray background, nostalgic mood, slightly grainy film texture. On the right side: a realistic color photo of the same person as an adult [AGE], identical pose and camera angle, resting her face on her hands, smiling warmly, modern outfit, soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field. In the center between them: a birthday cake placed exactly at the middle line, with lit candles forming the number "[AGE]", warm candle glow illuminating both sides. Both versions are looking at each other with emotional connection, perfectly aligned eye level. Text "(2000)" above the child side and "(2026)" above the adult side, minimal elegant font. Ultra realistic, 8K, high detail skin texture, soft shadows, cinematic color grading, clean composition, emotional storytelling.

entries.title: Gothic Alice Anime Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime illustration of an Alice in Wonderland inspired gothic lolita girl seated on a clean white background, shown in a dramatic three-quarter pose with her face intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in muted beige-pink. She has very long flowing pale blonde hair with soft curls and loose strands, decorated with black and navy bows, lace headband details, and a red rose hair ornament. Dress her in an ornate blue, black, and white frilled lolita dress with puff sleeves, layered ruffles, black corset lacing, gold embroidery, heart motifs, a blue gemstone bow at the collar, and a flared skirt lifted by the seated pose. Add Alice-themed accessories: a gold pocket watch hanging at her waist, a wristwatch over a white ruffled cuff, striped black-and-white thigh-high stockings, black garters, and small bow accents. She sits with one hand extended toward the viewer in the foreground, knees bent outward, creating strong depth and foreshortening. Surround her with playing-card suits, blue spades, red hearts, diamond icons, tiny stars, confetti, and geometric card fragments, plus red roses and scattered heart-shaped petals near the floor. Use polished modern anime rendering with crisp line art, glossy highlights, intricate fabric folds, luminous pastel lighting, high saturation blue-black contrast, elegant fantasy details, and a clean studio-white background.

entries.title: Cozy Scrapbook Photo Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform the reference image into a cozy scrapbook-style edit while preserving the same subject, pose, lighting, and background. Add small chibi mini versions of the person around the scene (on shoulder, table, etc.), matching face, outfit, and vibe, doing activities like reading, posing, taking photos, relaxing. Overlay cute handwritten doodles (hearts, stars, arrows, sparkles) and short captions. Use a soft pastel palette (white, pink, peach, blue) with a clean but visually rich layout.
Style: warm, dreamy, cozy Instagram aesthetic, soft depth of field, detailed and playful.
Final image must look like the same original photo enhanced not changed.

entries.title: Bad Doodle Gold Ninja Ghost
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a deliberately clumsy, childlike doodle illustration on a plain white background of a cute ghost-like ninja mascot named Gold Mitama. The character is bright golden yellow, with a rounded floating ghost body, a curled wisp of hair on top, a tapering ghost tail curling to the left, and simple thick black uneven outlines. Draw it in an intentionally bad MS Paint scribble style: shaky jagged lines, uneven coloring, visible white gaps, rough marker-like scribbles, flat colors, no realistic shading, low-detail amateur fan-art energy. The mascot wears a black ninja headband across the forehead with a tied knot and two flapping black cloth ends on the left; the front plate is gray and contains exactly 3 small triangular black symbols. Give the face half-lidded green eyes and a bored expression, with a skewer of exactly 3 dango balls held horizontally in the mouth: pink, white, and green. Add a purple scarf around the neck, with a colorful chest emblem made of overlapping rainbow-like blocks of blue, cyan, yellow, red, and green. On the left side behind the character, place a small sheathed sword or short ninja weapon with a brown handle and purple wrapping. On the lower right, show the character holding exactly 1 gray four-point shuriken with a circular hole in the center. Keep the composition centered, square, playful, messy, and intentionally poorly drawn, like a funny rough doodle generated from text only.
entries.description: Generates a messy childlike doodle of a golden ghost ninja mascot with dango, headband, scarf, sword, and shuriken for humorous social posts or avatar art.

entries.title: Crude Pixel King Ninja Doodle
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a deliberately crude MS Paint / low-resolution pixel doodle on a plain white background, centered composition. Draw a cartoon bust of a mysterious king-like ninja character with messy spiky black hair, pale beige skin, narrow rectangular sleepy eyes with black outlines, and a face mostly covered by a thick black mask or beard shape. entries.title: Ice Codex Robot Avatar
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a single full-body chibi codex avatar mascot on a clean white background with faint icy blue paint splatters and a soft frozen-ground shadow. The character is a small futuristic robot in an oversized dark navy-black hooded parka and chunky boots, rendered as a high-detail 3D digital illustration with painterly texture, glossy sci-fi materials, cyan rim lighting, and a cold arctic color palette. The hood is round and helmet-like, framing a black rounded-rectangle visor face with two sleepy half-lidded glowing cyan eyes and no mouth, giving a calm unimpressed expression. Add exactly 7 translucent jagged ice crystals protruding from the top and sides of the hood, with the tallest crystal at the center top, glowing electric blue edges, frosty refractions, and snow-like speckles. The torso armor is puffy and segmented with cyan circuit-like accents, small luminous panels, scuffs, scratches, and the glowing chest text DL. In the character's left hand, show exactly 5 stacked translucent glowing cyan crystalline data sheets or code pages fanned together; in the right hand, show exactly 1 open miniature laptop angled toward the viewer, with a cyan-on-black screen filled with tiny unreadable code lines. Use a centered composition, cute proportions with a large head and short limbs, dramatic icy blue highlights, detailed snow/ice texture on the ground, and a premium mascot-avatar look suitable for a developer profile picture. Customize the avatar as ice codex robot, with deep navy blue armor and cyan blue lighting.

entries.prompt:
Subject: A sharp, high-contrast side-profile portrait of a handsome man with a defined jawline, short stubble, and voluminous, textured dark hair styled upwards.

Details: Hyper-realistic skin texture, individual hair strands visible, high-grain film aesthetic.

Aspect ratio is 9:16

entries.title: Nurse Portrait With Stethoscope
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic, front-facing waist-up portrait photo of a female nurse or clinician standing against a plain off-white textured wall. The subject wears burgundy V-neck medical scrubs with short sleeves, a small chest pocket on the viewer's right, and a metal snap detail near the collar. A detailed stethoscope hangs naturally around the neck, with black tubing, silver metal binaurals, gray eartips resting near the pocket, and the round chest piece visible on the viewer's left side. The person has medium brown hair tied back with a few loose strands near the ears, neutral upright posture, shoulders squared, centered composition, cropped from just above the head to mid-torso. The face is intentionally covered by a large square skin-tone privacy mosaic block, hiding all facial features while leaving the hair, ears, neck, clothing, and stethoscope visible. Use soft even indoor lighting, sharp photographic detail, natural colors, minimal background distractions, and a clean clinical profile-photo style.

entries.searchText: anonymized business headshot this prompt generates a realistic studio portrait of a professionally dressed woman with a blurred face, suitable for anonymized profile, id, or mock resume imagery. a clean studio-style id photo of a young east asian woman from the chest up, centered and facing straight toward the camera against a plain light gray-white background. she has dark brown hair parted precisely in the middle and tied into 2 low pigtails hanging over both shoulders, with smooth straight roots and slightly softly curled ends. she wears a black tailored business blazer over a white crew-neck blouse, creating a formal job-application or passport-photo look. the composition is symmetrical, evenly lit with soft diffused studio lighting, realistic skin texture, natural color grading, sharp focus, and a minimal professional headshot aesthetic. frame vertically in a portrait orientation with the top of the head fully visible and the upper torso included. place a small subtle watermark-like text on the left side reading @yui_ai_model. cover the entire face area from forehead to chin with a large centered rectangular blur block in a beige-brown tone, as if anonymizing the subject. profile / avatar portrait realistic studio studio

entries.title: Ultra-Detailed Dewy Skin Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-detailed close-up portrait of a young woman's face captured in profile, based on the provided reference images to maintain accurate facial features. Her dark hair is soaked and naturally clings to her skin, with delicate water droplets and a light sheen of sweat creating a realistic, dewy texture. Emphasis on vivid green/hazel eyes with natural reflections, avoiding overly glossy highlights. Lips appear slightly wet with a soft, natural finish. Lighting is gentle and cool-toned, paired with a subtle light grey/white bokeh background for a clean, atmospheric look.
entries.description: A hyper-realistic portrait prompt focused on capturing wet skin textures, dewy sheen, and vivid eye reflections in a soft, cool-toned atmosphere.

entries.title: Cinematic Black and White Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-end, cinematic black-and-white studio portrait of a fit man with a refined, athletic build. The subject is positioned in a medium shot against a solid, deep black background that provides zero texture or distraction. He is wearing a dark, well-tailored blazer over a textured grey turtleneck sweater. The man is looking off-camera toward the upper right with a confident, slight smile and a bright, aspirational expression. His arms are crossed firmly over his chest, showcasing a powerful but composed "power pose." The lighting is classic Rembrandt-style, casting soft shadows that highlight his sharp jawline, groomed hair, and the subtle muscularity of his neck and frame. The final look is elegant and professional, with a high-contrast monochromatic color grade and sharp focus on facial details.
entries.description: A high-end studio portrait prompt for creating a professional, athletic male subject in a Rembrandt lighting style against a deep black background.

entries.title: Stylized 3D Cartoon Character Portraits
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute stylized cartoon boy with an oversized head and small body, standing with hands behind his back, leaning slightly forward while making a playful funny face with tongue out. He has messy brown hair, expressive eyes, and a mischievous smile. He is wearing a navy blue t-shirt, blue jeans, and casual sneakers. Background is a soft pastel blue with floating playful elements like rockets, planets, stars, and small toy cars scattered around in a clean pattern. Studio lighting, soft shadows under feet, vibrant colors, smooth 3D cartoon style, Pixar-like character design, ultra-detailed skin texture, high resolution, centered composition. A cute stylized cartoon girl with an oversized head and small body, standing with hands behind her back, leaning forward and making a playful funny face with her tongue out. She has two braided pigtails, soft facial features, and a cheerful expression. She is wearing a pink t-shirt, denim shorts, and pink sneakers. Background is a soft pastel pink with scattered cute flower patterns in a minimal, aesthetic layout. Bright studio lighting, soft shadows, vibrant pastel tones, smooth 3D cartoon rendering, Pixar-inspired character design, ultra-detailed, centered full-body composition.

entries.title: Nine-Panel Rainbow Hair Portrait Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A 3x3 contact-sheet style studio portrait collage with exactly 9 square panels arranged in a clean grid, each panel numbered in black serif numerals from 1 to 9 near the upper left corner. The same woman appears in every panel against a soft light gray seamless studio background, wearing a loose white button-up shirt with natural folds and a casual editorial look. She has long, smooth, slightly wavy hair rendered in vivid neon rainbow gradients, with hot red and orange at the crown transitioning through yellow, lime, cyan, blue, and violet toward the lengths and ends, creating a luminous iridescent effect. The face in every panel is obscured by a centered square mosaic blur block in skin-tone colors, covering the full face area while leaving hair, neck, hands, and clothing visible. Use soft, even beauty lighting, polished commercial photography, high detail, realistic skin and fabric, and a modern promotional headshot aesthetic. The 9 poses are: panel 1, facing front with both hands cupping the cheeks; panel 2, turned slightly left in three-quarter view with one hand lightly touching the neck/collarbone; panel 3, angled right with one arm raised and hand touching the back of the head; panel 4, leaning forward slightly with one hand lifted beside the face, fingers spread in a playful claw-like gesture; panel 5, resting head sideways on folded arms on a white surface, relaxed and dreamy; panel 6, front-facing with one hand supporting the chin or cheek in a thoughtful pose; panel 7, close crop from the left side with one hand lifted near the ear or hair; panel 8, front-facing with one index finger pointing to the cheek; panel 9, right three-quarter view with both hands together near the face as if softly clapping or posing delicately. Keep framing varied but consistent, mostly bust or half-body crops, with the rainbow hair as the central visual feature. Make it look like a nine-variation publicity photo sheet for a young woman, wearing a white button-up shirt, with neon rainbow gradient hair, on a light gray studio background, in a clean commercial beauty portrait style.

entries.title: Snowy Rabbit Hanfu Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed fantasy portrait of a young woman in side profile wearing elegant white rabbit ears and traditional East Asian hanfu in a snowy winter garden. She has silver white hair, extremely long, silky, and softly wind-swept, styled with ornate floral and jeweled hair ornaments. The face is mostly obscured by a large centered rectangular blur mask in muted gray, covering the eyes, nose, and upper cheeks, as if censored for privacy. The rabbit ears are tall, plush, white, and realistic, with pale pink inner fur, attached through an elaborate headdress featuring black lace, silver filigree, small blossoms, crystals, beads, and tassels. Visible in the headdress are 2 round embroidered ornaments with black rabbit motifs, plus multiple dangling tassels in black and white, delicate chains, and floral metal branches. She wears asymmetrical long earrings with beads and tassels. Her robe is a layered black-and-white hanfu with rabbit embroidery, with glossy dark trim, translucent pale fabric, and embroidered rabbit designs visible in 3 places: one small rabbit near the collar, one large circular rabbit emblem on the chest, and one faint rabbit motif on the sleeve. The overall palette is monochrome silver, white, charcoal, and soft gray, creating a cold ethereal mood. Snow is gently falling in the foreground and background. Behind her is a softly blurred snow-covered classical Chinese garden with pavilion roofs, with shallow depth of field, atmospheric haze, cinematic bokeh, ultra-fine textile detail, soft winter lighting, elegant composition, and a serene mystical aesthetic. entries.title: Signed Marker Portrait on Shikishi
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A lively hand-drawn fashion portrait in a changed illustration style, made to look like a signed fan-art sketch drawn with markers on a square white shikishi board with a thin gold border. Show a stylish young woman from about the waist up, leaning slightly forward with one elbow resting up near her face in a casual, friendly pose. Her face area is covered by a simple rectangular censor block in a muted beige tone. She has shoulder-length medium brown hair with warm highlights, soft volume, side-swept bangs, and flipped-out ends. Render the art with expressive black ink outlines, visible marker strokes, watercolor-like blending, sketchy hatching, and an energetic, vivid handmade feel. She wears a fitted dark gray ribbed long-sleeve knit top with subtle puffed shoulders, layered delicate gold necklaces, a dangling pearl earring, a beige crossbody bag strap running diagonally across her chest, and a light beige skirt or dress visible at the waist. Leave plenty of clean white background around the figure. Add 2 small sparkle doodles on the left side. Add handwritten Japanese thank-you messages and signature-style black ink writing around the portrait: at upper right write ありがとう! with an underline and a small heart, beneath it place a large stylized autograph reading Yui with a smiling face mark and a heart, at lower left write いつも応援してくれてありがとう♡, and at lower right write the date 2024.5.20 with another heart. The overall image should feel warm, personal, lively, and like a celebratory signed illustration on a square autograph board.
entries.description: This generates a lively signed marker-style portrait on a square shikishi board, useful for fan-art autographs, commemorative illustration posts, and personalized thank-you visuals.

entries.title: Shrine Maiden Offering an Omamori
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished anime-style illustration of a young shrine maiden named 音慰 standing inside a traditional Japanese shrine amulet office, shown from about thigh-up behind a wooden counter. She has long, straight black hair with a center part and soft shine, pale skin, and a calm, gentle presence. Her face is centered and front-facing, but the facial area is obscured by a rectangular blur block. She wears a crisp white kimono-style top with wide sleeves and a deep red hakama tied in a large bow at the waist, conveying a classic miko outfit. Both hands are presenting a white embroidered omamori charm toward the viewer, holding it carefully at chest level; the charm has a gold cord knot at the top and the vertical kanji text "御守" on the front. In the foreground on the counter is a wooden display tray containing exactly 10 visible omamori charms in multiple colors: white, pink, red, purple, and gold-patterned variants, each with decorative cords and gold or white embroidery. To the right on the counter are 3 neat stacks of paper shrine talismans or packets, each labeled in Japanese; the rightmost stack is tied with a red-and-gold mizuhiki cord. On the left side of the counter is a small wooden price sign reading "初穂料 800円". The shrine interior is warmly lit with natural sunlight entering from a large wooden-framed window on the left, creating a serene, clean atmosphere. Through the window, a red railing and softly blurred shrine grounds and greenery are visible. In the background are wooden shelves and traditional decor, plus a vertical hanging sign with Japanese text reading "御守 御札" and smaller text "各種祈願承ります". The composition is centered on the miko and the offered charm, with soft depth of field, delicate fabric folds, realistic hands, refined linework, and a high-quality modern anime rendering style that emphasizes the subject more than the environment.
entries.description: This prompt generates a clean anime-style shrine scene featuring a miko presenting an omamori at a shrine counter, ideal for character art with culturally detailed background props.

the rightmost stack is tied with a red-and-gold mizuhiki cord. on the left side of the counter is a small wooden price sign reading "初穂料 800円". the shrine interior is warmly lit with natural sunlight entering from a large wooden-framed window on the left, creating a serene, clean atmosphere. through the window, a red railing and softly blurred shrine grounds and greenery are visible. in the background are wooden shelves and traditional decor, plus a vertical hanging sign with japanese text reading "御守 御札" and smaller text "各種祈願承ります". the composition is centered on the miko and the offered charm, with soft depth of field, delicate fabric folds, realistic hands, refined linework, and a high-quality modern anime rendering style that emphasizes the subject more than the environment. profile / avatar realistic office

entries.title: Pixar Style Identity Preservation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create an image using the uploaded image.

Ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic, 3d pixar portrait of a young child, preserving the exact facial identity, structure, and proportions from the reference image with high fidelity.

Pose (must match exactly):
Child is sitting on the floor with legs crossed. One elbow is resting on the knee, with the hand supporting the side of the face (cheek pressed into palm). The other hand rests relaxed near the ankle or shin. Head slightly tilted forward. Expression is mildly annoyed, pouting, or bored with furrowed brows and subtle frown. Eye contact directed toward camera.

Body proportions:
Natural child proportions with slightly stylized softness. Maintain realistic anatomy, no exaggeration.

Face & expression:
Preserve original eye shape, nose structure, lips, and skin tone. Expression should reflect subtle frustration or impatience (pout, slight brow tension).

Hair:
medium to long natural hair, slightly tousled, soft volume

Clothing:
Casual modern outfit:
Random color long-sleeve sweater or similar soft fabric top
Denim jeans (rolled cuffs optional)
Clean white sneakers

Lighting:
Soft studio lighting, evenly diffused, gentle shadows under chin and body, smooth skin rendering without over-processing.

Background:
Minimal clean studio backdrop (light grey or soft neutral tone), seamless and distraction-free.

Details:
Highly detailed skin texture, realistic fabric folds, natural hair strands with subtle flyaways, crisp focus, 8k resolution feel.

Camera:
Eye-level perspective, centered framing, shallow depth of field but subject fully sharp.

Vertical portrait composition, full frame height emphasis, cinematic poster layout.

entries.title: Social Media Profile News Broadcast Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Analyze the uploaded X (Twitter) profile screenshot. First, extract my profile picture, display name, and bio text. Then, based on my bio and overall vibe, generate a realistic Japanese TV breaking news broadcast screen image featuring me. The character should closely resemble the person in the profile picture, shown as if being interviewed live on camera. Design it to look like a Japanese news program (similar to NHK News or News Zero style). All text must be in Japanese. Include the following elements: 1. A red "速報" banner at the top of the screen. 2. A large headline in Japanese summarizing who I am based on my bio (e.g., "AI時代の案内人 ○○氏 独占取材"). 3. A profile data box on the side of the screen (like Japanese news info panels) containing: - "人物像" section: 3 short bullet points about my personality or profession based on my bio - "注目ポイント" section: 3 small items representing my interests or skills inferred from my profile 4. A news ticker at the bottom with 2-3 humorous short updates derived from my bio and interests, written in Japanese. 5. A fictional Japanese news channel logo in the corner (e.g., "プロフィールTV" or "X速報チャンネル"). 6. A "生中継" or "LIVE" indicator in red in the upper corner. The overall look should be a photorealistic Japanese TV news broadcast screen with clean, modern Japanese typography. Ensure all Japanese text is perfectly legible and accurately reflects my profile information.

entries.title: Goth Streetwear Anime Icon Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A centered anime-style bust portrait of an androgynous young person facing forward against a clean pale gray-white background. The composition is square and designed like a social media icon. The character has medium-length layered straight hair with a center part, mostly black with glossy deep violet highlights and vivid purple-dyed lower sections and tips. Loose strands frame the face and the hair falls to the shoulders. The face is intentionally obscured by a large soft-edged square blur block in the center, tinted muted mauve-gray, covering the eyes, nose, and most facial features while leaving the jawline and neck partly visible. Show only a small hint of pale skin around the edges of the blur. The visible ear on the right side is decorated with multiple silver piercings, including small hoops, studs, and a dangling cross earring with chain details. The outfit is dark monochrome streetwear with a subtle goth aesthetic: a black high-neck zip-up inner layer fully zipped to the throat, a black oversized semi-gloss jacket layered over it, a black strap with a rectangular metal buckle over one shoulder, and a thin chain accessory over the other shoulder. Add a long silver necklace with a cross pendant hanging at the center of the chest. Lighting is soft and diffuse, with polished digital painting detail and semi-realistic anime rendering. The mood is cool, stylish, slightly mysterious, and alternative. In the background, add sparse minimalist cyber-glitch accents: several thin vertical bars and tiny rectangular pixels in pastel cyan, lavender, magenta, and dark blue scattered around the figure, plus one faint four-point sparkle near the upper right side. Keep the background uncluttered and airy, with the character occupying most of the frame.
entries.description: This prompt generates a stylish anime-profile portrait with purple-black hair, dark streetwear, and a blurred face, suitable for social media icons or alternative character branding.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Future Cat Neon Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cyberpunk neon poster-style illustration of a cute futuristic black cat mascot centered in a dark rainy high-tech city. The cat is a simple rounded silhouette with two tall ears, huge white circular eyes with tiny black pupils, a tiny worried mouth, and two hot-pink whisker marks on each cheek. Behind the cat is a glowing circular holographic halo made of layered magenta and cyan rings. The background is a dense futuristic cityscape filled with vertical light streaks, holographic glitches, data noise, reflections, and luminous signage in electric blue, purple, and pink. At the top center, large glowing text reads "未来猫" with smaller text below reading "FUTURE CAT". Include exactly 7 interface panels and HUD elements around the cat: 1 top-left badge reading "LEVEL 99", 1 upper-left panel reading "NEKO PROTOCOL" with smaller Japanese text below, 1 left-mid slanted panel with tiny unreadable techno glyphs, 1 left-lower panel reading "ERROR_404", 1 top-right warning panel reading "WARNING" with a triangular alert icon, 1 right-lower panel reading "NEKO UNIT-01", and 1 bottom-center status strip reading "> SYSTEM ONLINE <". Also add 2 small cat icons, one near the top-right corner and one embedded in the right-side UI area. Add faint small Japanese microtext near the lower right area. Style is glossy synthwave cyberpunk, anime-game UI fusion, poster composition, high contrast, moody nighttime atmosphere, heavy glow bloom, chromatic aberration, glitch texture, holographic reflections, wet neon ambiance, ultra-detailed background with the mascot remaining bold and graphic in the foreground. Square composition.

entries.title: Rainbow Bunny DJ Anime Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vibrant anime-style close-up of a cute DJ girl in a magical rave scene, framed from a slightly low angle as if the viewer is standing in front of the DJ booth. She has a short bob haircut with blonde with rainbow-dyed ends, fluffy bangs, and tall bunny ears, with the inner left ear showing a rainbow gradient. Her face is mostly obscured by a centered rectangular censor block in soft beige-pink, but the pose should imply a playful wink and a mischievous grin. She wears oversized heart-shaped sunglasses on top of her head, one blue frame and one red frame, with glossy purple-tinted lenses. One hand is pressing a large rainbow-colored headphone cup against her ear, while the other arm reaches forward toward the viewer over the DJ console, creating an energetic performance feel as if she is about to drop the next track. She is dressed in an oversized white hoodie with a large green butterfly emblem on the chest and 4 stitched heart patches on the sleeves and shoulder area: 1 orange, 1 purple, 1 blue, and 1 red. In the foreground, show part of a glowing DJ mixer with colorful neon controls, knobs, and a luminous pink heart icon. The background is a dreamy, hyper-sparkly club fantasy filled with glowing stars, hearts, glitter bokeh, pastel light beams, and soft rainbow highlights, with an "emo" yet kawaii atmosphere. Use highly polished anime illustration, glossy lighting, soft bloom, iridescent reflections, saturated rainbow accents, and a cute, energetic idol-DJ aesthetic.

entries.title: Crimson Dark Sorceress Ritual
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark fantasy illustration of a single floating woman centered in the frame, shown as a near-black silhouette against an intense glowing crimson background. She hovers a little above a reflective black-red water surface, barefoot, with both arms relaxed and slightly extended downward, fingers softly spread, her posture calm but powerful. Her very long black hair streams dramatically to the left in wild windblown tendrils, and her gown is a shredded, smoky, semi-translucent black dress with layered ribbons and torn fabric trailing downward into shadowy wisps. Behind her is one enormous ornate circular magic sigil, perfectly framing her body like a halo, rendered in intricate gothic filigree, concentric rings, and arcane lace-like geometry, glowing bright blood red with a hot white-red core. The entire scene is dominated by a black and deep red palette, with swirling smoke, embers, and magical energy filling the air. At the lower left and lower right edges are 2 clusters of sharp red crystals emerging from darkness. The bottom of the image shows one glossy reflective pool with rippling crimson highlights mirroring the light above. Make the atmosphere infernal, mystical, and regal, as if a dark sorceress is awakening in a forbidden ritual chamber. High contrast, cinematic backlighting, volumetric glow, ultra-detailed digital painting, vertical composition, centered symmetrical framing, ominous elegance, no text, no extra characters, no visible facial details.

entries.title: Cute Subscription Celebration Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A warm, cute digital illustration in a cozy desk setting celebrating a new subscription. On the left is a friendly humanoid robot mascot with a glossy black face screen showing pixelated purple LED eyes and a smiling mouth, wearing a tall black top hat with a purple band and a dark hoodie with a small American flag patch on one sleeve and the text "USN VET MSSP" on the chest. The robot gives a thumbs-up with one hand and holds a small rectangular sign in the other that reads "Subscribed!" with a purple heart underneath. On the right is a delighted young woman with long wavy golden blonde hair, seated at the desk with hands clasped near her chin in an excited grateful pose, wearing a white long-sleeve top with red and blue striped trim and a small chest logo. Her face is obscured by a simple square censor block. Above them, large playful handwritten text says "Nick subscribed Sharon!". Beneath the headline is a rounded notification card showing a circular avatar of the same robot mascot, the name "Nick", and the text "Subscribed to Sharon Riley" followed by a purple heart. entries.title: Gritty Córdoba Music Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical poster-style mixed-media portrait with a gritty urban editorial aesthetic, designed like a concert or personal brand poster. Center a middle-aged man from the waist up, wearing a black T-shirt, standing slightly turned and raising one arm upward with his index finger pointing toward the top of the frame. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur block. Use a dark black and sepia color palette with distressed cream and gold accents, heavy grunge textures, ink splatters, scratched overlays, torn-paper brush marks, dust, and weathered print effects. Place a large muted gold circular halo behind his head and upper torso. In the background, create a collage of Córdoba city landmarks: a cathedral facade on the right side, a river with bridge and low skyline on the left side, all blended into the textured poster composition. Add oversized bold condensed serif typography at the top reading EDU PEREYRA, with "EDU" in large distressed off-white letters and "PEREYRA" below in gold. Add 5 smaller text groups around the composition in uppercase handwritten or condensed styles: top left "MÚSICA PASIÓN VERDAD", top right "DESDE ADENTRO HACIA AFUERA", mid-right "LO QUE SE SIENTE NO NECESITA EXPLICARSE", mid-left "AGRADECER SEGUIR CREAR", and bottom center "TIERRA DE HISTORIA, CORAZÓN DE GENTE." Across the lower foreground, add a huge expressive brush-script word cordoba in off-white, slightly diagonal, with a gold underline swoosh. Include 3 small symbolic graphic accents: a tiny crown icon near the upper right, a small starburst ornament near the bottom center, and a handwritten signature mark at the lower right. The shirt should include vintage printed lettering and emblem graphics. Lighting is moody and contrasty, with the subject cut out sharply against the layered collage. Overall feel: raw, passionate, musical, spiritual, local-pride poster, premium distressed print design, high visual impact, cinematic and artisanal.

entries.title: Minimal Sci-Fi Anime Girl Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A simple anime-style upper-body portrait of a futuristic young woman centered on a plain light gray background, drawn with loose sketchy linework and soft pastel coloring. She has long, flowing very pale pink-lilac hair that falls past her shoulders, with thin wispy strands and a gentle glossy look. Her face is completely hidden by a large centered square blur/mosaic block in muted gray-lavender. She wears a large white beret-like cap with a dark navy inner band and 2 angular dark navy side attachments, one on each side, accented with small cyan details. Add a sleek sci-fi earpiece on the visible side of her head with translucent cyan glowing elements. Her outfit is a fitted sleeveless white high-neck bodysuit with 2 bright cyan vertical panels on the front, thin dark seam lines, and small angular dark navy armor-like accents near the chest and waist. One upper arm has a dark armband with 4 thin cyan-white stripes. Show her from about the chest to the top of the head, facing slightly to the viewer's left, with a clean elegant silhouette. Use a minimalist illustration style, delicate hand-drawn strokes, subtle cel-shading, white, cyan, navy, and pale pink as the main palette, and no background objects or text.

entries.title: Surreal Floating Head With Censor Block
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surreal studio portrait of a floating human head seen straight-on, centered in the frame against a vivid saturated blue sky with soft fluffy white clouds. The face is entirely obscured by a large smooth rectangular censor block in the center, covering from forehead to chin and most of the cheeks, with a subtle gradient of warm tan to muted blue-gray. Only the outer features remain visible: a close-cropped buzz cut with tight dark speckled hair texture on top, 2 visible ears, and the lower rounded chin and jaw. The head wears colorful eyeglass temples wrapping around the sides only, with no visible front lenses because the center is blocked; the left temple is pale cream with a tiny red-and-gold decorative mark, and the right temple is bright red-orange. Add 2 small rounded nubs peeking above the censor block near the top edge, one yellow on the left and one off-white on the right, creating a quirky toy-like feel. Render it as a hyperreal yet slightly uncanny 3D illustration, smooth skin, soft daylight, minimal composition, shallow depth of field, clean whimsical pop-surreal aesthetic.

entries.title: Censored Studio Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A centered studio portrait photo of a single adult man from upper chest to top of head, facing straight toward the camera against a smooth deep navy-blue backdrop. He has a very closely shaved buzz cut, visible ears on both sides, medium tan skin, and short dark facial hair concentrated along the chin and jawline with a faint mustache. Dress him in a plain off-white or cream crewneck sweatshirt with no logo. Use soft professional studio lighting with gentle highlights on the scalp, ears, neck, and sweatshirt, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, and a clean photographic look. Compose it symmetrically with the head near the top of frame and broad shoulders filling the lower half, in a vertical portrait orientation. Overlay 1 large opaque rectangular censor block centered over the face, covering from forehead to below the nose area and spanning most of the facial width; make the block a flat muted brown tone with slightly soft edges so the facial features are completely hidden.

entries.searchText: censored studio portrait this prompt generates a realistic studio head-and-shoulders portrait of a man with his face obscured by a large censor block, useful for privacy-themed visuals or anonymous profile imagery. a centered studio portrait photo of a single adult man from upper chest to top of head, facing straight toward the camera against a smooth deep navy-blue backdrop. he has a very closely shaved buzz cut, visible ears on both sides, medium tan skin, and short dark facial hair concentrated along the chin and jawline with a faint mustache. dress him in a plain off-white or cream crewneck sweatshirt with no logo. use soft professional studio lighting with gentle highlights on the scalp, ears, neck, and sweatshirt, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, and a clean photographic look. compose it symmetrically with the head near the top of frame and broad shoulders filling the lower half, in a vertical portrait orientation. overlay 1 large opaque rectangular censor block centered over the face, covering from forehead to below the nose area and spanning most of the facial width; make the block a flat muted brown tone with slightly soft edges so the facial features are completely hidden. profile / avatar portrait studio realistic studio

entries.title: Soft Monochrome Anime Girl Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft, airy anime portrait of a delicate young woman in a minimalist off-white background, shown from the chest up in a close three-quarter view. She has long, slightly wavy dark brown with ash-gray highlights hair with wispy strands and straight-cut bangs, tied on one side with a large black ribbon bow. Her eyes are large, glossy, and pale gray with detailed lashes and a dreamy, distant expression. She rests her cheek against one hand, with slender fingers partly covering her face and muted gray nail polish visible. She wears a white off-shoulder blouse with voluminous sleeves, soft ruffles, gathered fabric, and thin black ribbon ties on the sleeves, creating a gentle monochrome contrast. Add a single long, elegant gold drop earring with a small pearl on the visible ear. Use a clean manga-inspired illustration style with light linework, subtle blush tones, soft cel shading, and painterly highlights in the hair. The mood is quiet, wistful, and feminine, with a refined fashion-illustration feel and a very limited palette of white, black, taupe, and gray.

entries.title: Occult Eye Motif Anime Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean, minimalist anime illustration of a melancholic young woman in three-quarter profile, seated and resting her cheek against one hand. She has long straight blue-black hair with blunt bangs, very pale skin, and soft gray-blue eyes with a distant, tired expression. Her face is small and delicate, with a tiny beauty mark under one eye and subtle lashes. She wears a dark oversized layered outfit in deep navy and charcoal: a high-neck black top under a loose draped jacket or kimono-like outer layer, with faint gold line accents and tiny eye motifs worked into the fabric. Her accessories are occult-inspired and elegant: multiple ear piercings, one long dangling earring shaped like an eye with a teardrop pendant, a thin necklace with a small eye charm, and several rings including an eye ring on the hand touching her face. Her nails are painted muted slate blue. The background is a flat warm off-white with a carefully arranged gallery of mystical eye symbols and hanging ornaments. Include exactly 6 eye-themed wall elements: 1 framed eye picture in the upper left, 1 circular eye ornament hanging below it, 1 small circle target-like ornament near the upper right, 1 black hanging charm with an eye and geometric crystals on the far right, 1 square panel with a radiant eye at mid-right, and 1 dark rectangular panel with an eye and 4 teardrop shapes at the lower right. Add a dark bottle silhouette and a few muted blue-gray leaves on the left side as secondary decor. Use a restrained palette of navy, black, cream, gray-blue, and touches of muted gold. The composition should feel quiet, gothic, feminine, and introspective, with flat graphic shapes, crisp linework, little shading, and a modern decorative poster aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a stylish single-character anime portrait with mystical eye-themed decor, ideal for moody editorial art, posters, or profile illustrations.

entries.title: Anime Selfie With Sphynx Cat
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute anime-style vertical selfie illustration of a smiling young man with short dark brown hair and large round glasses holding a hairless Sphynx cat in a black sling bag outdoors. The man is shown close-up from the left side of the frame, wearing a black hoodie or jacket, with a cheerful open-mouth smile and bright sparkling eyes, as if taking a selfie. His right hand is raised at the top right, lifting a yellow leash strap. The Sphynx cat is centered and tucked inside the front sling bag, with very large ears, pale pink wrinkled skin, big glossy blue-gray eyes, and a calm slightly curious expression. The cat wears a warm brown sweater with tiny colorful confetti-like shapes and a yellow collar or harness. In the background, show the exterior of a modern transit station or large public building with curved steel beams and glass, under a soft blue sky. Add a decorative sign floating near the upper center with the Chinese text "带皮子出去玩" in a cute ornamental frame. Include soft pastel sparkles, tiny hearts, paw-print accents, star shapes, and a subtle lens flare near the lower left to create a warm playful mood. Clean polished line art, soft shading, pastel lighting, glossy highlights on the glasses and eyes, wholesome slice-of-life anime aesthetic, highly appealing social-media illustration.

entries.title: Moody Censored Indoor Selfie Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic indoor selfie-style portrait of a young East Asian man from the chest up, seated near a large modern window in a high-rise apartment or hotel room during soft daylight. He has black hair, thick and slightly tousled with a center part and soft volume over the forehead and sides. His build appears slim, with a long neck and smooth light skin. He wears a black button-up shirt made of matte cotton or poplin, slightly oversized, with the top several buttons undone to create a deep open collar and relaxed, casual styling. The camera is held close in a natural selfie angle, portrait orientation, framing the shoulders, chest, neck, and head. His face is fully obscured by a large centered rectangular blur or mosaic censor block, while the ears, jawline edges, neck, and hair remain visible. The mood is understated, moody, and elegant, with muted neutral colors, soft window light from the right side, gentle shadows, and a candid social-media selfie feeling. Background details include 1 beige wall section on the left, 1 small dark wall control panel, 1 vertical metallic trim or lamp edge, and 2 tall dark-framed window panels on the right with a faint out-of-focus city skyline outside. Photorealistic smartphone photo, clean modern interior, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, subtle contrast, no smile visible because of the censor block, minimal editing, stylish and believable personal selfie.

entries.prompt: A highly realistic casual smartphone selfie taken indoors at a McDonald's restaurant in Asia, framed as a chest-up portrait of a young man seated at a table. The camera is held slightly above table height at arm's length, creating a natural front-facing selfie perspective with one forearm extending toward the lens. The subject wears a black T-shirt with a small white Tesla logo on the left chest, has short straight black hair, thin dark eyeglass frames partly visible, and rests one hand lightly against his chin in a relaxed pose. His face is fully obscured by a large solid rectangular blur block in the center, preserving privacy while leaving the hair, ears, jawline edges, and glasses arms visible. In the lower left foreground sits 1 white McDonald's paper drink cup with a lid and a white straw, cropped by the frame. The background shows the restaurant counter area with warm ambient lighting, 1 large red wall panel on the left featuring the yellow McDonald's arches and the white slogan "i'm lovin' it" with Chinese text below, 4 illuminated digital menu boards across the top displaying burgers, fries, combo meals, prices, and Chinese text, plus 2 people in the background near the counter, one facing away with a backpack and another partially visible behind the register. Use natural color balance, slight indoor grain, realistic reflections, shallow to moderate depth of field, and the candid look of an unstaged social media snapshot.

entries.title: Ornamental Kimono Girl with Cats

entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration of a seated young woman in an elegant Japanese-inspired fantasy kimono composition, centered on a clean warm off-white background. She has long straight black with deep blue-violet undertones hair with blunt bangs and very long flowing side lengths, with red and blue ribbon strands woven through the hair. Her eyes are large and luminous crimson red, and her expression is calm, soft, and slightly wistful. She wears an ornate floral hairpiece on the right side of her head made of 4 major blossoms in red, white, pale blue, and blue, with dangling gold ornaments and tassels. Her outfit is a richly patterned kimono in red, black, pale blue, cream, and touches of purple, covered in cherry blossoms, stylized flowers, butterflies, cords, bows, and hanging tassel decorations. The sleeves are oversized and flowing, with visible red cord knots and floral appliqué details. She sits in a graceful curled pose with one hand near her face, bare legs prominently visible, wearing white tabi-like socks and elaborate red-and-black platform sandals with bows. Surrounding her are exactly 4 cats: 1 black cat sitting on a branch at left looking upward, and 3 white cats placed around her lower left, mid-right, and lower center-right. The overall palette should balance vermilion red, black, ivory, pale cyan, sky blue, and lavender. Her pose is a compact crouch with both knees up, one elbow resting on a knee, one hand partly covering the lower face or cheek, and the other hand hanging down near the front shoe. entries.title: Minimal Pelican Riding Bicycle
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist vector-style illustration on a flat light gray background showing a pelican riding a bicycle, drawn from simple geometric shapes with thick dark charcoal outlines. The composition is wide and centered, with the bicycle occupying the lower two-thirds of the image and the bird's head floating slightly above and forward of the handlebars in a deliberately abstract, diagram-like way. The pelican is constructed from clean abstract pieces: a white rounded head with a small black circular eye, a long open beak pointing left made of 2 parts with an upper orange triangular section and a lower pale pink pouch section, a short dark curve on top of the head, a small separate white oval neck/body connector, a larger white rounded body positioned over the bike, and a single white wing-like shape angled upward over the back. Add exactly 2 orange leg shapes, long narrow rectangles leaning downward from the body toward the bicycle frame, suggesting the bird is pedaling. Keep the forms intentionally sparse and slightly surreal, like a logo test or simple code-editor doodle, with no shading, no gradients, no textures, no text, and lots of negative space.

entries.title: Censored Point-Cloud Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist monochrome portrait made entirely from millions of tiny white point-cloud dots on a pitch-black background, showing 1 adult man from the chest up in a formal dark blazer and light collared dress shirt. The subject is centered slightly to the right, facing forward with a subtle three-quarter turn, with neatly combed short hair and one visible ear sharply defined by dense lidar-like particles. Render the figure as raw 3D scan data mixed with topological contour logic: ultra-dense stippling, precise geometric dot placement, faint isoline structure, and clean depth shaping across the hair, jacket lapels, collar, neck, and shoulders. Keep the face intentionally obscured by 1 large vertical rectangular censor block in dark gray to black, perfectly centered over the facial area from forehead to below the nose, creating a stark privacy-mask effect. Use matte texture, crisp edges, sharp focus, high contrast, no glow, no bloom, no neon, no fog, no motion blur, no chromatic aberration, no painterly strokes. Add 1 small four-point sparkle icon in light gray in the bottom-right corner. The overall image should feel mathematical, forensic, and futuristic, like a high-resolution lidar scan portrait in 8k.

entries.title: Cinematic Backlit Woman Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic vertical portrait of a young woman shown from the chest up in a close half-body composition, positioned slightly right of center, with her body turned to the right and her head turned back toward the camera in a restrained over-the-shoulder pose. She has long black hair, loose and slightly messy, being blown strongly through the frame so many strands lift outward and sweep across the air around her face and shoulders. Her visible styling is elegant and minimal: a dark thin-strap slip dress or camisole exposing the shoulder line, collarbone, and upper back, with a sheer black off-shoulder wrap or translucent outer layer slipping down the arms to create a soft dark framing shape around the lower body. The mood is cold, quiet, mysterious, and wistful, with a high-fashion cinematic realism rather than glamour polish. Use dramatic backlighting from the upper left, creating a bright halo along the hair, shoulder, and edge of the body, while the front of the figure stays mostly in shadow with only extremely soft fill light. The face is largely obscured in darkness and soft haze, emphasizing silhouette, neck, ear, shoulder, and luminous hair edges more than facial detail. The background is a dark gray to near-black empty space with 2 clear environmental elements: floating dust-like particles and soft circular bokeh light spots scattered mostly on the left side and around the hair. Overall color grading is low saturation with cool blue-gray shadows and slightly warm skin tones for subtle warm-cool contrast. Add diffused bloom, misty atmosphere, faint film grain, soft vignette, and shallow depth of field. Keep the eyes and lips de-emphasized or hidden in shadow, avoid hard frontal light, avoid bright busy background details, avoid cartoon styling, avoid oversharpening, and avoid plastic skin texture.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Web3 AI Profile Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic vertical sci-fi personal brand poster in a dark blue cyberpunk style, designed like a futuristic profile infographic for Meta_wu. The composition centers on a young Asian man shown from the back and in partial side profile, standing confidently in a glossy black futuristic jacket with luminous blue accents and the text "META_WU" and "WEB3 × AI" printed on the back. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur block. Behind him is a dramatic outer-space scene with a large glowing Earth filling the upper background, dense stars, a futuristic megacity skyline at night, neon road light trails, and 1 small flying spaceship near the left-middle area. At the very top, place a huge metallic ice-textured title reading "Meta_wu" in bold beveled silver letters with blue rim light. Directly below it, add 2 centered lines of Chinese text: the first line is a role tagline reading "BTC矿工|币安夏普比率No.1交易员|程序员|专注web3+AI交叉", and the second line reads "投资观察-加密货币&美股&A股". Surround the character with glowing holographic HUD panels in transparent dark glass with cyan neon borders. On the left side, create 4 stacked panels: panel 1 is an "关于我" card containing 4 lines of profile info, "科技|Hongkong 🇭🇰", "github.com/Ferwoo", "出生于 1999年5月1日", and "2016年10月 加入"; panel 2 is a social stats card with 3 large metrics, "1,950 正在关注", "3,906 关注者", and "1 置顶推文"; panel 3 is a "BTC MINER" card showing 1 large gold Bitcoin coin and a server-mining rack scene; panel 4 is a "交易哲学" card with 3 lines of text, "数据驱动 × 理性决策", "长期主义 × 价值投资", and a glowing upward candlestick chart. On the right side, create 6 stacked panels: panel 1 shows a globe icon and "被全球KOLs关注 1"; panel 2 shows a group icon and "被中文KOLs关注 93"; panel 3 shows a chart icon and "全球影响力排名 62,434 /200K"; panel 4 shows a trophy icon and "华语影响力 5,053 /10K"; panel 5 is a "TRADER" card with subtitle "币安夏普比率 No.1" and a golden rising line graph, plus the small text "SHARPE RATIO TOP 1"; panel 6 is a "DEVELOPER" card with code-like text lines "// Code is law", "// Web3 is future", "// AI x Crypto", "function build() {", "return change_the_world();", "}" and a GitHub-style icon. entries.title: Mars Selfie With Alien and Rocket
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic selfie on the surface of Mars, framed at arm's length in a casual slightly wide-angle smartphone perspective. In the foreground are 2 subjects standing close together from chest-up: a human man on the left wearing a black crewneck shirt with a clear white OpenAI logo on the chest, and a tall elegant female alien on the right with shimmering blue-green metallic skin, elongated ears, subtle facial ridges, and a sleek biomechanical-looking outfit with bronze and silver tones, a deep neckline, fine ornamental seams, and layered necklaces with a prominent blue gemstone pendant. The man has short dark messy hair and his left arm extends toward the camera as if taking the selfie. The alien leans in close beside him, both posed like a friendly commemorative snapshot. The background is a red rocky Martian desert with scattered stones, low hills, and a dusty orange sunset sky. On the far left stands a roadside-style sign with 2 lines of text reading MARS and WELCOME HOME. On the far right in the distance is 1 large retro-futuristic white rocket standing upright on landing legs, with visible vertical text reading SPACEX. Warm orange lighting, cinematic realism, detailed textures, subtle atmospheric haze, social-media-announcement vibe, high detail, natural depth of field.

entries.title: Moonlit Celestial Kimono Dancer
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A breathtaking fantasy anime illustration of a celestial shrine maiden in a snowy winter night landscape, shown in a graceful full-body dancing pose beside a reflective lake. She has extremely long, flowing rose pink hair, partially seen from the back and side, with an elaborate gold floral hair ornament and dangling chains. Her face is mostly obscured by the angle. She wears a richly layered, ornate Japanese court kimono inspired by a jūnihitoe, with voluminous sleeves and many overlapping panels in crimson, white, purple, green, gold, and soft pink, decorated with floral brocade, embroidered blossoms, metallic trim, and shimmering patterns. Both arms are raised elegantly as she appears to guide 2 huge arcs of translucent iridescent silk or magical ribbon that spiral around her body in a luminous loop, catching rainbow highlights like soap-film aurora light. The ribbons glow with prismatic reflections and tiny sparkles, framing her against the sky. The setting is a moonlit lakeshore covered in fresh snow, with bare winter trees on the right, a small traditional pavilion or shrine structure across the water on the left, and the bright full moon high in a deep indigo sky filled with dense stars and softly falling snow. The water mirrors the moonlight and glittering particles. Emphasize cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, ultra-detailed fabric textures, dynamic flowing motion, magical sparkle effects, elegant composition, and a dreamlike celestial mood. Highly polished anime key visual, vertical composition, intricate detail, luminous highlights, no text, no watermark.

entries.title: Long Stretching Tabby Cat
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A whimsical minimalist illustration of a brown tabby kitten standing upright in the exact center of a very tall vertical canvas, with an absurdly elongated, noodle-like body stretched from near the top to near the bottom of the image. The cat has a small round face with large glossy eyes, a tiny open smiling mouth, upright ears, and both front paws raised straight overhead in a cheering pose, showing 2 visible pink paw pads. Its fur is soft and detailed, with a white muzzle, chest, belly, and inner legs, and brown-and-black tabby stripes along the sides, head, arms, and tail. The body is extremely thin and vertically extended, creating a comical exaggerated proportion, while the hind paws remain tiny and close together at the bottom. Add 1 curved striped tail extending to the lower right side. Above the head, place the playful hand-drawn text "nyoooon~" in a rounded dark brown font, arched like a semicircle, with 6 short motion lines around the raised paws and text to emphasize stretching. Use a clean off-white or warm light beige background with no scenery, only a faint soft oval shadow beneath the feet. Cute, polished digital illustration style, centered composition, high detail in fur, humorous Japanese sticker or social-media mascot vibe, lots of negative space, extra-tall aspect ratio.

entries.title: 3D Pop-out Profile Page Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic 3D illustration depicting a slightly tilted Twitter/X profile page with a simple gray background. Keep the original cartoon avatar. The interface must resemble a real X screenshot, including realistic layout, verification badges, follower stats, profile banners, and tweet sections.

Profile Details:
A stylish young man with fluffy jet-black short hair and fair skin leaps out from a torn paper section on the right side of the profile page. He retains his original facial features but with the expression changed to a natural and confident smile. He holds the edge of the torn paper as fragments fly everywhere, creating a strong 3D breakthrough effect.

Soft studio lighting, cinematic shadows, depth of field, ultra-high detail, sharp focus, realistic skin, realistic UI reflections, premium composition, 4K resolution, a blend of realism and subtle Pixar style.

Important Notes:
- Do not change the avatar
- Keep the X UI interface accurate
- Retain original facial features
- Subject is male
- Only enhance the smile
- Ensure all Chinese text is clear and legible
