entries.title: Melancholic Marionette Watercolor
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a melancholic monochrome watercolor illustration on textured off-white paper: a fragile young marionette woman seated front-facing with her knees together, torso visible from thighs to head, suspended by exactly six thin vertical puppet strings, three on the left side and three on the right side, extending beyond the top edge. She wears a tattered, lace-like sleeveless dress in washed charcoal gray, with torn floral ruffles around the shoulders, neckline, waist, and skirt hem. Her posture is limp and resigned, shoulders slightly slumped, arms hanging down close to her sides as if controlled by strings. Give her soft ash gray messy short hair gathered loosely into a tousled side bun, with loose strands and indistinct watercolor edges. Cover the face with a flat opaque medium gray square, centered over the facial area, creating an anonymous and unsettling mood. Use delicate ink-like pencil lines for the strings and silhouette, layered gray washes, granulating pigment, blooms, paper stains, dripping watercolor trails, and splattered textures around the body. The background should remain mostly blank white with pale gray wash clouds and vertical drips, emphasizing isolation, control, and the feeling of a marionette who thought she was free. No readable text, no frame, no bright colors, no photorealism.

entries.title: Editorial Portrait Photo Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Editorial 3x3 photo grid in a clean soft beige studio. Character (matches reference 100%) wearing lightweight dark navy shirt, ivory trousers, barefoot for raw simplicity. Lighting: large diffused key light directly front-right, silver reflector left, subtle rim from top. Shots to include: 1. extreme close-up of lips + cheekbone with blurred hand partially covering (85mm, f/1.8, razor-thin DOF); 2. tight crop on eyes looking into lens with reflection of light strip visible (85mm, f/2.0); 3. black & white close portrait resting chin on fist, face filling frame (50mm, f/2.2); 4. over-shoulder shot, blurred foreground fabric curtain framing half face (85mm, f/2.0); 5. very close frontal with hands overlapping face, light streak across eyes (50mm, f/2.5); 6. tight angled portrait showing hair falling into eyes, soft-focus background (85mm, f/2.2); 7. crop of hands touching jawline, eyes cropped out (50mm, f/3.2, detail-focused); 8. half-body seated sideways on low cube, head turned sharply away, blurred foreground (35mm, f/ 4.5); 9. intense close-up of profile with single tear-like water droplet, cinematic light slice across (85mm, f/ 1.9). Angles: mostly tight headshots with slight high/low tilts, maintaining variation. Capture RAW, professional muted grade, smooth tonal contrast, subtle cinematic grain. Mood: intimate, introspective, character-led editorial minimalism with delicate use of fabric as prop.

entries.title: Ornate Emerald Magical Girl Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly polished anime magical-girl portrait in the style of a luxurious shoujo illustration, showing a confident teenage heroine inspired by a planet-themed sailor guardian. She stands in a three-quarter pose from mid-thigh up, centered, with her left hand on her hip and her right hand giving a thumbs-up. She has warm chestnut brown hair styled in a very high, voluminous ponytail tied with 2 glossy green bead ornaments, with long flowing curls sweeping dramatically to the right. Her outfit is a classic sailor-style magical uniform with 5 clearly visible main clothing elements: a fitted white bodice, a deep emerald-green sailor collar, a large pink chest bow with a round green gem brooch at the center, a short pleated emerald-green skirt, and a large pink back bow visible at the waist. She also wears 4 visible accessories: 2 long white elbow gloves, 2 stacked emerald-green wrist bands, small pink gemstone stud earrings, and a green choker. Render the costume with glossy satin-like highlights and elegant reflective fabric. The character should project bravery, poise, and sparkling heroic charm. Place her against an ornate celestial fantasy background split diagonally into 2 contrasting zones: a dark midnight-blue galaxy field filled with stars, and a luminous iridescent crystal field with prismatic shimmer. Surround the scene with elaborate gold filigree lacework, hanging crystal chains, star pendants, jeweled ornaments, and large faceted gemstones. Include floral crystal decorations in the corners, especially layered translucent flowers and roses in lavender, violet, and icy blue tones. Fill the entire image with intense sparkle effects, lens-like starbursts, glitter dust, and jewel reflections. Use a rich palette of emerald green, blush pink, gold, sapphire, lavender, and pearl white. The composition should feel premium, radiant, ornate, and nostalgic, like a deluxe collector art print of emerald planet guardian. Ultra-detailed anime illustration, crisp linework, glossy highlights, luminous shading, intricate decorative background, masterpiece quality, square composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a lavish anime-style magical girl portrait with jeweled celestial decorations, ideal for character art, fan-inspired posters, or premium fantasy illustrations.

entries.title: Anime Girl in a Golden Clockwork World
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A breathtaking vertical anime illustration of a delicate steampunk time world filled wall-to-wall with enormous interlocking clocks, exposed gears, rotating rings, pendulums, and ornate mechanical structures in polished gold, brass, bronze, and dark steel. The composition is extremely dense and intricate, with exactly 3 dominant oversized clock faces visible: one in the upper left, one large partial clock in the lower right, and one central ring-like clock structure near the upper middle, surrounded by dozens of smaller visible clockworks and gear assemblies layered deep into the background. A radiant shaft of white-gold light pours down from the top center, creating sparkling highlights, rim light, reflections, lens-like glints, and dramatic depth across the metallic machinery. In the lower left floats a young anime girl, about three-quarter full body, with soft pastel pink long wavy hair streaming outward as if suspended in air, large emerald green eyes, and a gentle, slightly wistful expression. She wears an elaborate dusty rose pink lolita-style dress with heavy frills, lace, ribbons, layered ruffles, floral details, puffed sleeves, corset lacing, and matching heeled shoes, plus a flowered bonnet or mini hat tilted on her head. Her pose is light and floating, one arm slightly extended, skirt and hair blown by invisible motion, as if drifting inside a giant celestial clock tower. The mood is magical, luminous, intricate, and romantic, with ultra-detailed linework, high-contrast lighting, rich metallic reflections, fantasy steampunk aesthetics, and painterly anime rendering in the style of a premium key visual. No text, no borders, no extra characters. Emphasize overwhelming scale, dense mechanical complexity, and the contrast between the soft feminine character and the monumental golden machinery.

entries.title: Exhausted Girl in a Quiet Room
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft, muted monochrome anime-style illustration of a tired young woman lounging indoors in a quiet room, drawn with delicate sketchy linework and flat subdued shading in warm gray-beige tones. She has long dark brown to nearly black hair with wispy loose strands and soft bangs, pale skin, and half-lidded weary eyes. Her expression is drained and absent-minded, with a slight pout and a feeling of emotional exhaustion. She is slouching sideways in a chair or sofa, leaning her head into one hand with her elbow propped up, her posture loose and unguarded, giving a natural "all the tension has left her body" feeling. She wears an oversized dark charcoal off-shoulder long-sleeve sweatshirt slipping down on one side, exposing one shoulder and collarbone, with a relaxed baggy silhouette. In the foreground is a round table with a plain light-colored mug, 2 small paper wrappers or notes, and 1 small rectangular piece of chocolate. On the left side of the room is a simple vase holding several leafy branches on a small surface. A small hanging note on the wall reads "おつかれわたし". A thought bubble near her head reads "なんもしたくな〜い". The composition is vertical and intimate, like a casual lifestyle illustration or mood drawing, with lots of negative space, a minimalist background, understated domestic details, and a calm, sleepy, emotionally worn-out atmosphere.
entries.description: This prompt generates a soft monochrome anime illustration of a weary young woman slouching at home, ideal for mood art, social posts, or relatable lifestyle character scenes.

entries.title: Childlike Pastel Portrait Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy mixed-media pastel illustration on textured white paper with a visible vertical fold down the center, in a naive childlike crayon-and-oil-pastel style. Show a half-hidden portrait of a girl placed slightly left of center, with only part of her face visible because a large soft-edged rectangular blur obscures the middle of the image from forehead to chest. The visible features include dark teal-black hair, one warm brown eye, hints of cheek and neck, and a cream or pale yellow garment. Surround her with loose scribbled botanical lines and abstract strokes in turquoise, olive green, black, white, ochre, and peach. Scatter hand-drawn Japanese hiragana and numbers around the composition like children's marks on paper: 「新」 and 「し」 in orange at the upper left, 「お」「ば」「ら」 stacked vertically on the upper right in mustard and dark olive, a small turquoise flag shape at mid-right, an orange sun symbol near the lower center-right, the number-like text 「11.6」 in brown at the lower right, and an orange open-book icon at the lower left. Add several sweeping diagonal crayon lines in golden yellow and white crossing behind and around the figure. Keep the composition airy, imperfect, expressive, and slightly melancholic, with rough grainy pigment, visible paper texture, muted earthy colors, and the feel of a child's memory drawing combined with contemporary art illustration.
entries.description: This prompt generates an expressive mixed-media portrait on textured paper with handwritten Japanese marks, ideal for poetic editorial art or album-cover-style imagery.

entries.title: Fiery Fairy Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical Japanese movie poster in a hyper-detailed cinematic fantasy style, glowing with fiery orange, red, gold, and neon magenta light over a nighttime city skyline. In the center, a single chibi-like fairy woman is the star, floating toward the viewer in a dynamic forward-reaching pose with one oversized hand extended in forced perspective. She has short wavy auburn-brown hair, pointed elf ears, large iridescent translucent butterfly wings, a sparkling silver beret, a fitted white shimmering top, a short holographic metallic skirt, and glowing white shoes. Her face area is deliberately obscured by a centered square censor block in warm brown. Behind her, explosions of particles, sparks, comet streaks, and radiant lens-flare energy create a sense of destiny and impact. The composition is packed like a blockbuster teaser poster, with glowing Japanese typography and social-media-style callout panels arranged around the character. At the very top, large luminous Japanese text reads: 「そのひと言が、誰かの明日を燃やす。」. Across the upper left is 1 profile card panel showing a circular avatar, a Japanese display name with blue verification badge, handle, bio text, link, and follower count, styled like an X profile screenshot. On the left side there are 3 additional stacked callout panels: panel 1 says 「フォロワー 11,000+人 いつもありがとう!」 with a follower icon; panel 2 says 「今日のAI解説 生成AIってなに? 初心者向けやさしく解説」 and includes a thumbnail card with small engagement counts; panel 3 says 「アイデア → 作品へ AI × 創造力で あなただけの物語を。」 with small creative tool icons. On the right side there are 5 glowing speech-bubble panels with icons, each angled slightly and rim-lit in orange: 1 「わかりやすい AI解説! 神です...!」 with a heart icon, 2 「元気をもらえる! いつも励み!」 with a smiley icon, 3 「作品づくりの勇気が出る! 背中を押された!」 with a star icon, 4 「AIで好きが形になる! アイデアが広がる!」 with a camera icon, 5 「制作の真価 プロの現場から学ぶ AI活用テクニック」 with a clapperboard icon. Across the lower middle, add a handwritten glowing phrase in blue-white: 「想いを カタチに。」. Below it, the giant main title in blazing molten brush-style Japanese lettering reads: 「未来は、つくれる。 タイムラインの 妖精アーヤ」, with an English subtitle underneath in small serif capitals: "FAIRY AYA OF THE TIMELINE". Beneath the title, add dense film-credit style lines in Japanese, including creator/AI/video references, then a centered starring line: 「主演:妖精アーヤ」 with small wings. At the very bottom, place a huge release notice in bold glowing Japanese text: 「近日公開」, and to its right a rounded dark plaque with gold border that says: 「未来は、つくれる。」. Add a small butterfly emblem near the lower right. The whole image should feel like a magical viral social-media celebrity transformed into the lead of an epic fantasy film, with explosive contrast, richly textured particles, neon embers, glossy poster finish, and premium theatrical key art for 妖精アーヤ.
entries.description: A high-impact Japanese fantasy film poster featuring a social-media fairy heroine, ideal for recreating viral cinematic poster transformations.

entries.title: Fantasy Social Media Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luminous fantasy-anime movie poster in a vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, centered on a cute chibi-style fairy girl standing on a glowing circular platform in a futuristic neon city at night. She has short wavy auburn hair, pointed elf ears, large sparkling brown eyes, translucent iridescent butterfly wings, and a clear glittering beret-like halo cap. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered square mosaic censor block. She poses like a performer or creator on stage, one arm raised holding a glowing pen-like wand, the other arm extended outward. She wears a glossy white cropped long-sleeve top, holographic iridescent shorts, and chunky white sneakers. The whole image is drenched in pastel violet, pink, blue, and pearlescent highlights, with floating particles, lens flares, sparkles, bokeh, butterflies, and magical light trails. Around her float 10 translucent holographic social-media-style panels and interface cards: 1 large post card at upper left showing her portrait with the Japanese text "今日の想いを、シェアします。" and reaction counts "12.6K", "532", and "1.2K"; 1 small quote card near top center-left reading "今日の気づき 小さな一歩が未来を変える。"; 1 small memo card at top center-right reading "アイデアメモ いつか、声になる物語。"; 1 large video post card at upper right showing her portrait with a play button and the text "夢は、声に出すと動き出す。"; 1 square heart-like icon panel at mid-left; 1 quote card at left center reading "あなたの言葉に救われました。"; 1 story panel at lower left reading "みんなのストーリー あなたの体験が、誰かの勇気に。" with 3 small thumbnail images; 1 reply/comment card at mid-right reading "共感しました! ずっと応援しています!" with a tiny profile icon; 1 prompt panel at right center reading "プロンプト 光、希望、つながり、未来、魔法、優しさ" with a button labeled "生成"; and 1 hashtag card at lower right reading "#想いがつながる #今日もありがとう #未来をつくるのは私たち". Add 2 floating engagement counters near the lower right of the character: a heart counter "25.8K" and a repost/share counter "3.7K". Include a diagonal film strip in the lower left foreground with 4 visible frames featuring the fairy girl, plus a partially visible video editing timeline interface beneath it. The background should feel like a magical digital metropolis with skyscrapers, screens, and a crowd silhouette at the bottom, blending social media, filmmaking, and fairy-tale aesthetics. At the very top, place the Japanese tagline "ひとつの投稿が、誰かの明日を光らせる。" in elegant white text. At the bottom center, create a huge glowing Japanese title in ornate serif calligraphy: "タイムラインの妖精", with a small butterfly ornament, and below it the English subtitle "FAIRY AYA". Add realistic movie-poster credit lines in Japanese beneath the title, including names such as "監督:ヒカリ ユウ", "脚本:ナナセ マイ", "出演:フェアリー アヤ", and a row of production credits ending with "2025 FAIRY AYA Film Partners". Along the very bottom, add the Japanese line "あなたの投稿が、映画になる。" and a large release line "2025.7.25(金) ROADSHOW". entries.title: Japanese 36K Followers Celebration Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a celebratory Japanese social-media milestone poster in a square format, mixing a realistic smartphone profile screenshot on the left with bold hand-drawn manga-style lettering and colorful festive doodles on the right. The main headline should dominate the upper-right area in huge red brush lettering with a white outline and yellow burst accents, reading 36,000人突破!. Beneath it, add large black handwritten calligraphy reading 感謝です!, underlined with a thick hot-pink marker stroke. The left side shows a tilted smartphone-style screenshot of an X/Twitter profile page in Japanese, with a dark banner header, profile avatar, verified badge, username line, bio text, tabs, and a visible follower count circled in red. The follower count should read approximately 36,004 followers, with the circled number placed near the lower-middle of the phone screenshot. Include a visible post preview with a 2x2 image grid of sparkling gold and colorful light textures. Around the whole composition, fill the white background with energetic confetti, streamers, stars, crown doodles, party poppers, hearts, squiggles, and colorful radial bursts in pink, blue, yellow, orange, and teal, creating a loud celebratory announcement design. In the lower-right corner, place a cheerful anime-style chibi male character with dark brown curly hair, wearing a black hoodie, raising one fist in a victory pose. The chibi face should be simple and cute, with flushed cheeks and an excited expression. Add a white speech bubble outlined in black near the character containing 2 lines of Japanese handwritten text: the first line says いつも応援してくれる皆さんのおかげです! and the second line in pink says 本当にありがとう!. Count and render exactly 11 major decorative motif types across the page: confetti pieces, streamers, stars, crown doodles, party poppers, hearts, radial burst lines, spark marks, squiggle ribbons, colored paint-like swashes, and exclamation accents. The overall style should feel like a handmade celebration flyer meets social-media achievement graphic, with thick brush lettering, marker textures, bright saturated colors, playful asymmetry, and a high-energy Japanese pop aesthetic.
entries.description: A vibrant social-media milestone graphic celebrating 36,000 followers, useful for announcement posts, fan-thank-you visuals, and promotional celebratory banners.

entries.title: Haunting Statue Woman at Sunset
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic dark fantasy photograph of a weathered marble-like woman seen from behind in a ruined garden at sunset, framed from mid-back upward. Her face is turned partly over her shoulder but remains mostly hidden in shadow. She has an antique Greco-Roman appearance with pale stone-textured skin, hair pinned into a loose classical updo, and a draped one-shoulder gown in aged ivory fabric that looks cracked, dusty, and partially fused to her body like an eroded sculpture. Across her exposed back and arm are delicate botanical tattoo-like markings and a faded blue floral mosaic embedded into the shoulder blade area. The atmosphere is moody, haunting, and elegant. Place 2 tall stone columns in deep shadow on the left background, dense dark trees and foliage on both sides, and clusters of small pale flowers in the lower garden. Use a glowing amber-orange sunset sky behind her as a strong backlight, with soft rim light on her shoulders and hair, very deep shadows in the foreground, shallow depth of field, rich contrast, muted earth tones, and ultra-detailed textures of cracked plaster, aged fabric, and stone. Fine-art editorial photography, hyperreal, mysterious, melancholic, 85mm lens look.
